GUI_IntroText:
The year is 2236. Dwindling resources and overcrowding on Earth have prompted wide-scale planet colonization across the galaxy with the primary goals of mining and the expansion of habitable space. Interstallar flights are performed on gigantic CargoSpaceway ships that spend anywhere from several days to many months travelling to new colonies.

Location: the planet Astlan. This planet has been found suitable for colonization, having gravity similar to Earth. However, while the atmosphere is rich in both nitrogen and oxygen, it is unsuitable for breathing due to hostile microflora and poisonous impurities in the air, as well as other protein forms of life. A gradual alteration of the atmosphere is estimated to bring it to within liveable values within 15 years. The colony of Astlan-1 is actively expanding on the surface. It is inhabited by miners, terraforming specialists, builders, pilots, engineers, and many more. During early surveys of the planet, emissions of gas containing the valuable element Livermorium were discovered on a large volcanic island, and mining operations were deployed shortly thereafter. Since that time, the planet has become even more attractive for colonization by corporations seeking to exploit its abundant material wealth, and scientists drawn to study Astlan's unique alien life.

Core to these efforts is the need to quickly move goods and personnel around the planet. Only a few are brave enough to risk transporting cargo in small aircraft through the harsh weather and alien conditions found on Astlan. They are known as Frontier Pilots.

product_Isoptera_descr: Sealed container of the 4th class, with biomaterial of local fauna. These flying creatures were nicknamed "termites" for the similarity of their symbionts with the dwellings of terrestrial insects.
GUI_HelpScreen_Target: In the message history, you can select the location {btnY}as the current target{/btnY}, which is mentioned in the dialog.
product_bacillus_pumilus_descr: Tanks with a concentrate of terraforming bacteria such as bacillus pumilus. Thanks to the connectors built into the container, they can be used directly as a cartridge for spray guns.
GUI_HelpScreen_Map_Text: Choosing bases, you can find the product you are interested in, a passenger, a ship, or an upgrade.
GUI_HelpScreen_Map_TextIcons: Icons indicate the availability of goods, upgrades, passengers or ships based on the base.
Quest_SantaNY2021_Intro:
Happy New Year and Merry Christmas to everyone! A special gift provided by developers for Balena can be found in the customization menu (skins)! 

And everyone who meets Santa next to at the northernmost island, can get another gift!
bases_raglor_dock_north_descr: The seaport in the northern part of Raglor specializes in the extraction and extraction of local shellfish, which are highly appreciated by cosmetologists from the best manufacturers.
bases_raglor_dock_south_descr: The southern port is the main artery connecting the large spaceport on Astlan with the mining enterprises of Raglor
product_shellfish_descr: Delicious shellfish are packaged in high-tech transport aquariums. Thanks to their unusual appearance, they have become a real hit in haute cuisine. To maintain their original shine, they are served alive.
ScarabAdditionalLight_Descr: Plasma headlights from IK-Core surpass all expectations, because the brightness of their plasma cores shows more than 13,000 LUM
ScarabBaseLight_Descr: 6000 lum LED headlights with pleasant white color. Included in the basic Scarab configuration.
ScarabAdditionalLandingLight_Descr: Plasma headlights from IK-Core, 14,000 LUM and automatic landing lights.
bases_Hel_north_descr: A small northern port of the Hel archepilaga, local mollusks, which prefer cold waters, are brought here and processed.
bases_Hel_south_descr: A small base located on a plateau formed by ancient glaciers. Here archaeologists discover the ancient world of the planet, deepening into the thickness of ice, the lower layers of which are tens, and maybe hundreds of millions of years old.
bases_researchlaboratory_Hel_descr: The Robert Edwin Peary Modern Oceanic Laboratory. Here colonists explore the northern waters, and recently have been trying to breed local fishing giants in the waters of the western bay.
bases_sea_north_descr: The largest marine hub in the entire colonized space of the planet.
bases_Hel_east_descr: The base is located on the eastern tip of the island. The main functions are geological exploration, but judging by the request, they are going to build a large processing plant here.
product_whale_steaks_descr: Protein-rich meat "ingens quasi cete" or "whale", as they used to call the local relict animals, with habits reminiscent of their earthly counterparts.
product_underwater_drone_descr: Container with auto-assembly, deep-water, multifunctional drone. The Poseidon 12 is a state-of-the-art, heavy-duty autonomous vehicle with advanced artificial intelligence, designed for deep sea installations and exploration activities.
product_termodrill_descr: The specialized drill Perifet V is equipped with a compact thermonuclear reactor, specially designed for penetrating crystalline rocks at low temperatures.
quest_astlan_main_Pre_prolog01:
Your first training mission will land at the Spaceport across the bay.
The destination is marked with a {ivt} yellow indicator {/ivt}.
Show_Help_SelectBase_Message:
Great, the destination of the route has been selected! Pay attention, the targets are select from those that are in the direction directly in front of the camera. So sometimes you have to turn your head to choose the one you need.

Now, let's go.
Show_Help_ReachBase_Message:
We've landed, okay, now you need to recharge your battery.
On the compass and augmented reality, the landing pad is marked with the letter "H". For mooring, it is necessary to place the ship in the center of the platform and align with the contour on the surface.
GUI_HelpScreen_PassangerTake_Text2: Move close and press {btnA} [IVT_UI_Select] {/btnA} - to agree to take the passenger on board.
GUI_HelpScreen_HUDMenuPanels:
Here you can enable or disable the display of each HUD element.
To select, press twice {ivt} [IVT_UI_Left] {/ivt},
Canyon_Epilog_1: Hi, Captain. I have great news! Our leaders came to an agreement. Come to the Canyon and we will personally thank you and tell you the details.
Canyon_Epilog_2: There you are. Damn, I still can't believe that we pulled it off! I thought this only happens in movies.
Canyon_Epilog_2_NPC_yes: The very evening you brought them, Julia and I invited my superiors to meet with the staff. Imagine their surprise when they were at the same table! Next came the presentation and report on losses. Julia and I also developed a joint development project plan.
Canyon_Epilog_2_NPC_both: So, my salary increases and Canyon has a promising future! Here are a few credits.  And yeah, I'm getting married! Of course you are invited. I will forward you the details later. Good luck, captian! And visit us sometimes
product_tools_car1_descr: Universal units of the popular line. Actively used in construction and garbage businesses.
product_topsecret_descr: A securely sealed container equipped with a self-destruct system in case of any unauthorized tampering.
malfunction_radar_prewarning_text:
Dangerous emissions at this altitude!
Radar failure likely.
quest_raglor_next_phase_1:
{Say}Hey, it's Frank.
Come back to the {Quest}base{/Quest}, I have a job for you.{/Say}
quest_raglor_next_phase_2:
{Say}Hey, it's Frank. I wanted to let you know that construction is in full swing...
You know, this is the biggest project I've ever worked on. Thanks for your help.{/Say}
quest_raglor_next_phase_3:
{Say}Hello buddy, how's it going?
Construction is moving fast. 
Holy sh~~
*Interference*
*Connection is cutting off*
{/Say}
quest_raglor_radar_delivery_1: {Say}The authorities instructed me to install radars around the perimeter of the base. {Quest}These things{/Quest} are f-ing heavy, could you help me to deliver the materials to the construction site?{/Say}
quest_raglor_radar_delivery_3:
{Say}Hmm ...Why do they need that many radars..?
Well, our business is simple - they pay us, we work.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radar_delivery_3_answer1: {Say}So, no one knows what they're for?{/Say}
quest_raglor_radar_delivery_3_Say2: {Say}The authorities keep everything secret, but to be honest it worries me. And I'm not the only one. Among the workers there are various rumors, including a possible alien invasion....{/Say}
quest_raglor_delivery_complete_1:
{Say}Great! Building materials for the first radar are at place. Go back to the base for the next cargo.
By the way, do not worry about payment. As soon as you deliver all the materials, I'll transfer the credits to your account.{/Say}
quest_raglor_delivery_complete_2: {Say}Ok, cargo is in place. Come back for the last one.{/Say}
quest_raglor_delivery_complete_3:
{Say}Great, all the materials are delivered.   Now I will transfer  {System}20000 cr{/System} to your account.
Meanwhile, you can help us with construction, just bring the necessary goods. Good luck!{/Say}
quest_raglor_delivery_complete_4: {Say}Thank you, my friend. Take {System}20000 cr{/System}. See ya.{/Say}
quest_raglor_biggun_heavy_cargo: {Say}Hey, our counter-pendulum transmission broke, the entire structure might not hold up. Help me to deliver a {Quest}new transmission{/Quest} to the upper part of the structure. You will be paid well.{/Say}
quest_astlan_main_buy_2.2_complete_Say2: {Say}Well, Evoire is another mining colony planet. They're practically our neighbors; less than a week away on a CargoSpaceway. There were reports that something strange happened there and then a famine began.{/Say}
quest_astlan_main_egg: {Say}Hey. I'm sure you know that similar biological samples are in high demand. The nearest research laboratory is at the {Quest}Bora{/Quest} station.{/Say}
quest_astlan_main_buy_2.2_complete: {Say}The first priority cargo is accepted. I understand you are a friend of Mr. Plam? Great. It's not as bad as Evoire, but rations are in great demand here. Bring more rations and we'll buy them for a great price.{/Say}
quest_astlan_main_passenger_3.1_complete:
{System}The passenger is on board, Captain.
You can close the hatch {System}[IVT_Ship_Cargo_OpenClose]{/System} and go.{/System}
quest_astlan_main_1_complete:
{Say}Great, you've arrived. My name is Plam, I'm the director of Green Way. We provide assistance for customs and related logistics.
I have a job for you! But first, align your ship with the markings on the loading zone.{Say}
Message_ShipCrash: You received a ship similar to yours with identical equipment. {SUM} credits has been deducted from your account as payment for insurance. Your money will be donated to the Federal Colonies Support Program.
quest_raglor_main_4.1_complete: {Say}Thank you for the flight. It is pleasure to work with a professional. Hopefully compensation of {System}25000 cr{/System} will allow me to count on the confidentiality of the route and objectives of our flight!{/Say}
quest_raglor_main_2.2_complete: {Say}Sorry, Captain. I have confusing data: perhaps the person I was looking for has already left the CargoSpaceway.{/Say}
quest_geo_north_Mining_Scanner_Transport: Thank you, but I did not understand... What exactly should I do?
Passenger_Hardmaterialmining_TakeMe: Captain, are you ready to take me on board?
Passenger_Hardmaterialmining_TakeMePleas: Captain, I still need a transfer. Maybe now is a good time?
Passenger_Hardmaterialmining_Ready: I am ready, we can take off.
Passenger_Hardmaterialmining_WrongCity: Captain ... we are not at the destination point. Should I get out?
quest_raglor_main_2.1_complete: {Say}Captain, I have just been informed that a man from the colonial subsoil committee with whom I have an appointment is preparing for departure. Looks like we need to hurry.{/Say}
quest_raglor_main_3.1_open: {Say}Yes, it was confirmed. The commissar left the CargoSpaceway on a personal shuttle just a few minutes ago. The {Quest}coordinates{/Quest} are loaded, maybe we can catch him up.{/Say}
quest_raglor_main_3.1_complete: {Say}Captain. Sensors report interception of encrypted message at atypical frequencies. Data analysis is impossible.{/Say}
quest_raglor_main_2.1_open: {Say}Good afternoon, Captain. I have an appointment on a {Quest}CargoSpaceway{/Quest} so I need a transfer.{/Say}
challenge_livermoriummining_south_Open: Hi, we are recruiting only the craziest pilots! If you want to get a contract then fly through the radar towers!
quest_geo_north_Pilot_Rescue_3_dialog_an: But now that everything is ok, we will be there soon.
quest_missing_pilot_geologicalstation_no: Attention! {Say} In the area of the Northern Gorge a pilot has gone missing. Initially the ship’s signal was lost then the beacon of the rescue capsule stopped working. Last known coordinates received.{/Say}
{Say}Captain, black box data received. Preliminary analysis: the pilot lost control after a sharp deterioration in weather conditions.{/Say}
quest_geo_north_Pilot_Rescue_2_open_sear: {Say}Captain. Based on ship data, the latest capsule signals and MCC analytics, the search area of the rescue capsule has been calculated.{/Say}
quest_missing_pilot_geologicalstation_no: {Say}Captain, sensors indicate a massive alien body inside the skate. It is probably the rescue capsule.{/Say}
quest_geo_north_Pilot_Rescue_2_complete:
{Say}Thank you! Looks like you hooked the capsule out of the ramp?! 
Damn! I can't get out. 
Everything is stuck here and the hatch is jammed. Take me to the base. 
They will help!{/Say}
quest_geo_north_Pilot_Rescue_3_complete: {Say}Thanks, captain! We will get the pilot out of that thing!{/Say}
quest_geo_north_city_phase_1_complete: {Say}Preliminary data confirmed! Congratulations buddy, you are the founder of a new colony. But jokes aside, there will be especially great contracts for you. And we will need materials and people to build and develop the mine.{/Say}
quest_missing_pilot_geologicalstation_no: {Say}There are slight traces of atypical spectrum irradiation. Analytics are not available.{/Say}
quest_geo_north_Pilot_Rescue_3_dialog: {Say}Do you see what kind of crap happened to me!? They shoot me down! Stingray eats my capsule and at the same time, its fried from the inside!{/Say}
quest_geo_north_Pilot_Rescue_3_dialog_an: Shot down? Come on, everything shows that you just bounced off a mountain!
quest_geo_north_Pilot_Rescue_3_dialog_Sa: {Say}I flew for two years in an Ox v2 in war zones so I can distinguish "bounced off" from shot down! Hm... peaceful place... We should get the fuck out of here!{/Say}
quest_geo_north_Mining_Scanner_Transport: {Say}So, I am leaving. Probably this contract with North Gorge would be of interest to you. There is preliminary data about the new field. But a final scan is required. If it's confirmed, there will be a new mine. And great contracts for you.{/Say}
{Say}It's simple: you need to install a geo-scanner as shown on the map. The device can be bought or the one I had on board might working. It should be somewhere next to the wreckage.{/Say}
quest_Contraband_Cargo_1_greeting: Welcome! M&T received a report of criminal activity on the base. Find and eliminate smuggled goods.
quest_Contraband_Cargo_1_greeting_NPC_ye: There are many reports of criminal activity. We connect it with the notorious criminal Cable's arrival on Raglor. M&T has asked you to find and hand over illegal goods hidden on their base. Presumably, there should be 3 cargos of contraband.
quest_Contraband_Cargo_1_greeting_NPC_no: Fine. The criminals hid three illegal containers on M&T. Find and take them to the loading area.
product_Contraband_Cargo_descr: Goods are illegal. Base employees are notified of your credentials: problems with security services will not occur.
quest_Contraband_Cargo_2_complete: Citizen! The corporation reported that they received all suspicious goods. Congratulations, your payment is on the way to your account.
quest_Contraband_Cargo_2_greeting: Did you find the first box? Deliver and sell it at the landing zone as if it were a regular good.
quest_canyon_10_1_invite: Captain, over. This is Julia! I have a very important task for you. Fly to Canyon-Central.
quest_canyon_10_1_greeting: Captain! Ready for a long trip to Astlan? And yes, you will need a passenger compartment.
quest_canyon_10_1_ME_no: I'm leaving. Tell me on the way.
quest_canyon_10_1_NPC_yes: I reported to the board of directors about finding the livermorium deposits. I lied, of course. But the board member is already on the way to the spaceport. One of the Kapu Inc chiefs is on the way too - Julia's work. Oh, and I completely forgot - visit the hangar. You will find a present there.
quest_canyon_10_1_NPC_no: Do not rush. Before you go visit the hangar at Canyon-Central, install a couple of upgrades at our expense.
quest_canyon_10_1_complete: If you destroy such big cones, you and I will be taken out of the ground and buried in it. A reliable passenger compartment for the Ox or Ballena has not been invented yet. But scientists invented this device! Well, good luck.
quest_canyon_10_1_reminder: Captain, this is a matter of urgency. I am begging you, please install all the necessary modifications and fly. Let me remind you - you need improved wings and a passenger compartment.
quest_canyon_10_2_greeting: Captain, did Romulo update you? Well .. Behave naturally, politely but confidently. The best not to let our precious chiefs to cross, but it's no other way.
quest_canyon_10_2_complete: Are you a taxi? And what took so long? Romulo, you arriviste, get ready for rebuke!  And you - hurry up!
quest_canyon_10_2_complete_1: Mr. Wright? What a pleasant surprise to see you outside your mansion. What forced you to leave your place?
quest_canyon_10_2_complete_2: A terrible cold, disgusting food, late taxi. I thought this day could not get worse. I was mistaken. Do not bother me, Horacio!
quest_canyon_10_3_talking: Clarence, I heard recently that your stock has plummeted. Vulkanis has it's own problems too...
quest_canyon_10_3_talking_1_1: I made it clear that I do not want to talk with you! What an annoying little brat...
quest_canyon_10_3_talking_1_2: Ha! Don't judge a book by its cover, Mr. Wright. I'm only a couple of years younger than you. Gene mapping give a result.
quest_canyon_10_3_talking_2_1: Such a Long flight... Clarence, come on! Chatting is the best way to spent time during a flight. What do you think of our recent 'Gemini' fragrance line? I can order a couple of exclusive samples for your wife. Does she prefer floral smell? ...
quest_canyon_10_3_talking_2_2: I don't need anything from you. Do not bother me.
quest_canyon_10_3_complete: Mr. Wright, Mr. Silverline... How was the flight? I hope it went without incident. Let me guide you to your apartment...
quest_canyon_10_3_complete_1: What an annoying guy, this Horacio! Although, it's probably not worth it to talk about superiors like this... It seems that everything is going according to the plan, Captain. You have no idea how much I appreciate the job you've done.
quest_canyon_10_3_ME_yes: He is not just 'some guy'. He is over 100 years old!
quest_canyon_10_3_NPC_yes: "What are you talking about? Go get some rest. Alright, Captain, I have to go. Thanks again!
quest_canyon_10_3_NPC_no: Not at all! we do not know how far this 'competition' could go. Actually, it is no longer a competition; it's a war! All right, Captain, I won’t hold you up. Thank you very much.
Marktext_Canyon_Buy_Wings: Install the wings and VIP compartment (Scarab)"
quest_smugglers_1_1_Cable_greeting: Hey Captain, I brought a couple pallets of illegal {Quest}20-year-old whisky{/Quest} from Earth. Deliver it quietly to the {Quest}M&T Corp{/Quest} and I will pay you a great sum!
quest_smugglers_1_1_Cable_quest_complete: Cargo is in the hold? Great! You'd better {Quest}hurry{/Quest}, though. My... client does not have much patience.
quest_smugglers_1_2_Cable_quest_complete: Thank you, friend! I transferred a couple thousand creds to your account. If you want to make some easy money then {Quest}come back later on{/Quest}.
quest_smugglers_1_2_Cable_quest_failed: Are you a complete moron? Or did you decide to screw me over? I hope the first option... For your own sake.
quest_smugglers_2_1_1_Cable_greeting: Hey, mate, I just found a great job for you, but there were some problems because of the whiskey you delivered earlier. I have to get out of here as soon as possible! Do me a favor: take me to {Quest}'NileSTAR'{/Quest}! I will pay you well.
quest_smugglers_2_1_Cable_quest_complete: I'm inside! Let's go to {Quest}NileStar Research{/Quest}. I have some good friends there.
quest_smugglers_2_2_Cable_quest_complete: Attention! A dangerous fugitive has been sighted on Raglor. Nickname: {Quest}Cable{/Quest}. Anyone caught aiding and abetting this criminal will be considered a criminal themselves.
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_ME_yes: What the hell have you done?
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_ME_no: And what should we do now?
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_NPC_yes: It's nothing personal. Anyone else could have been in your place. Landing here would be a bad idea. Let's go to {Quest}Orient-RESEARCH{/Quest}. There should not be any problems. Or security.
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_NPC_no: I am glad you understand. Now let's go to {Quest}Orient-RESEACH{/Quest}.
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_failed: ATTENTION! The criminal {Quest}Cable{/Quest} has been sighted with an accomplice. Orders - immediate termination! Do not let them go!
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_failed_1: Seems like one survived... it's the accomplice! Oh yeah, of course you didn't know who he was.... Ok, well your black box proves that, I guess. But you did engage in smuggling and you will be fined {Quest}20 000 credits{/Quest}.
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_quest_complete: Phew, we made it. So, how do you like it on the other side of the law? Not that you have much of choice now... Work with me and get rich, or Raglor becomes your grave. If not me then the police will kill you.
quest_smugglers_3_1_Cable_ME_yes: What kind of cargo? Why do we need it?
quest_smugglers_3_1_Cable_NPC_yes: I rented a place here but have not yet furnished it. We don't even have beds! Here is a job for you: take the equipment at {Quest}Drill Site N{/Quest} and bring it here. Oh yeah, the cargo is {Quest}really heavy.{/Quest}
quest_smugglers_3_2_Cable__completed: Did Cable send you? The cargo is on the loading platform.
quest_smugglers_3_2_Cable_NPC_yes: Are you kidding me? No signatures or contracts that would leave a paper trail! Is this your first time? Time to lose your virginity! Okay, load the cargo and get the hell out of here.
quest_smugglers_3_2_Cable_NPC_no: Nice. Let's move; nobody should see us together.
quest_smugglers_3_3_Cable_quest_complete: Why did it take you so long? It's so boring here... At least now we have some stuff to do. But first, here is your money.
quest_smugglers_3_3_Cable_quest_failed: Where the hell are you? Was it too hard to get it done? If you sold the stuff somewhere you're not gonna get any money... And you will sleep on the floor!
quest_smugglers_4_1_1_Cable_greeting: Life just got better. Now it's time to think about security. My friend will provide us with a device that hides everything from locators, radars or whatever. Pick it up from {Quest}M&T Corp{/Quest}. And don't screw up!
quest_smugglers_4_1_2_Cable_greeting: Even though you are a moron, I don't have another associate. Plus, I cannot leave the asylum, but the work must be done. Fly to {Quest}M&  Corp{/Quest} and deliver a special cargo. No more mistakes, got it? It is your last chance!
quest_smugglers_4_2_Cable_ME_yes: What kind of device is it?
quest_smugglers_4_2_Cable_NPC_yes: I have to warn you - this crap somehow affects the devices nearby, including your ship. For example, it might affect your {Quest}navigation{/Quest}. And be careful; it's a fragile cargo, any damage might cause an {Quest}explosion{/Quest}!
quest_smugglers_4_2_Cable_NPC_no: I have to warn you - this crap somehow affects the devices nearby, including your ship. For example, it might affect your {Quest}navigation{/Quest}. And be careful it's a {Quest}fragile{/Quest} cargo, any damage might cause an explosion!
quest_smugglers_4_2_Cable_quest_complete: Just in time! The cops are preparing a raid; most likely they are looking for us! We should lay low for a while. {Quest}Come back later{/Quest}. And here it is your money.
quest_smugglers_4_2_Cable_quest_failed_2: Trevor Bakinski. You have the right to remain silent. Anything you say can and will be used against you in a court of law. Take him away. And what the hell is that?
quest_smugglers_5_1_Cable__greeting: I have a job for you. Go to {Quest}NileStar{/Quest} and bring the {Quest}passenger{/Quest} here. And do not ditch him, otherwise, I will destroy you.
quest_smugglers_5_1_Cable_ME_yes: Who is it? Why is he so important?
quest_smugglers_5_1_Cable_NPC_yes: Another suicide bomber will join our squad. His name is Hydam, he is an expert in ... sensitive issues. Go and get him. Move, move, move!
quest_smugglers_5_1_Cable_quest_complete: I'm inside, brother. We can move. No questions or conversations yet. Let's talk when we reach {Quest}Orient-RESEARCH{/Quest}.
quest_smugglers_5_2_Cable_quest_failed: Hydam? HYDAM! ... You killed him you bastard! {Quest}Hydam{/Quest} was a key person in our operations. He was my comrade!
quest_smugglers_5_2_Cable_quest_complete: Welcome, Hydam! Good to see you, especially now. Join our suicide squad. Cap, money for your services is in your account. Come back after {Quest}some time{/Quest}, Hydam will be your boss from now on.
quest_smugglers_6_1_Cable_greeting: You need to find and deliver some {Quest}special material{/Quest}. {Quest}Search area{/Quest} has been uploaded to your navigation computer.
quest_smugglers_6_1_Cable_ME_yes: Special? What is special about it? And what's it for us?
quest_smugglers_6_1_Cable_NPC_yes: I am a bomb expert. There is one profitable but risky little job. But, details later, brother. Your task is {Quest}to find{/Quest} and deliver {Quest}material{/Quest} here. And not to ask stupid questions. Get going!
quest_smugglers_6_1_Cable_quest_complete: A {Quest}highly toxic mineral{/Quest} has been detected. Loading on board may have some negative consequences. Be extremely careful, Captain.
quest_smugglers_6_2_Cable_quest_complete: Attention pilots: a {Quest}cyclone{/Quest} is approaching the continent with with heavy rains and wind. Flying in the upper layers of the atmosphere is {Quest}not recommended{/Quest}. Thank you for your attention.
quest_smugglers_6_3_Cable_quest_complete: Is it done? Well done, brother. You survived in such a storm, and delivered the material. Come back later, I need to do something.
quest_smugglers_6_3_Cable_quest_failed: How long are you going to mess around out there? And where does Cable find such morons? Do not come back! And if you have betrayed us, we will find you. Understand?
quest_smugglers_7_1_Cable_quest_greeting: The moment of truth has come, brother. I made {Quest}a bomb{/Quest}, which you need to deliver to the base of our customer's competitors, {Quest}M&T Corp{/Quest}. Succeed and we all get rich. Fail, and you don't want to know... Good luck.
quest_smugglers_7_1_Cable_quest_complete: As I said, the bomb needs to be delivered within a time limit. The timer is set to 6 minutes. This should be enough for you to install the bomb and leave. And relax: it’s lunchtime so there shouldn't be anyone there. Don't delay, brother.
quest_smugglers_7_2_Cable_quest_complete: Is the bomb in place, brother? Fine! Get out of there and wait for the fireworks!
quest_smugglers_7_2_Cable_quest_failed: Hey, you disappeared from the radar. Is everything alright?... Cable... No sign of life. He is dead.
quest_smugglers_7_3_Cable_quest_complete: Where is the explosion? Did you do everything right? Damn, the mechanism might be broken, or security found and disarmed it... Ok, bro, let's go back to the base. We will decide our next step
quest_smugglers_8_1_Cable_ME_yes: And what's the matter? Who are these people?
quest_smugglers_8_2_Cable_completed: Cap, I no longer see any more signs of life in the area. Either they got out on their own or they are already dead. Come back to {Quest}base{/Quest}.
quest_smugglers_8_3_1_Cable_completed: All of them are gone? Not good. Seems like we have to put our plans on hold. For now. See ya later, Cap.
quest_smugglers_8_3_2_Cable_completed: Not everyone survived. If the cops killed them we will definitely pay them back, but for now we have a mission. We don't have enough guys. I will try to find some desperate people here on Raglor. In the meantime, get ready, Cap. The end is close.
quest_smugglers_8_3_3_Cable_completed: Did you manage to save all of them? Great! You all, get ready for departure. We can't afford to waste any time.
quest_smugglers_8_special_Cable_greeting: ATTENTION! Engine overheating! Go to the {Quest}nearest hangar{/Quest} as soon as possible!
quest_smugglers_8_special_Cable_NPC_yes: Estimated cause of problem - sabotage, external influence, most likely an explosive device. {Quest}200 seconds{/Quest} until critical engine overheat.
quest_smugglers_9_special_Cable_NPC_yes: Estimated cause of problem - superheated volcanic dust. {Quest}200 sec.{/Quest} until critical engine overheat.
quest_smugglers_8_special_сompleted: I underestimated you! Yes, I tried to kill you, but it's just business. Don't mention our little joint venture, or I will track you down. See ya!
quest_smugglers_8_special_failed: HEAT LEVEL CRITICAL! SYSTEM MALFUNCTION! ERROR 321LE-4
quest_smugglers_9_1_Cable_greeting: It's time! {Quest}Deliver{/Quest} my crew to {Quest}M&T Corp{/Quest}.
quest_smugglers_9_1_Cable_NPC_yes: So, we finally have enough fighters. Your task is to take the soldiers, pick up the {Quest}container{/Quest} with weapons and ammunition, and drop the guys off at {Quest}M&T Corp{/Quest}. They will take care of the rest. Don't screw up, Cap, I'm counting on you.
quest_smugglers_9_2_Cable_completed: Ok, guys, the armor store is open, take anything you want. Does everyone have a gun? Cap, {Quest}drop us off{/Quest} at the location and don't forget to destroy the evidence.
quest_smugglers_9_2_Cable_failed: The connection was lost. Radar shows the ship crashed and everyone died... Hey, what's going on? Answer me!
quest_smugglers_9_3_Cable_completed: Let's do this, guys! Cap, you can go. It's going to get real hot around here. Do not forget to get rid of the evidence. Deliver the box {Quest}here{/Quest} where no one will find it. Once it's done, you will get your money.
quest_smugglers_9_3_Cable_failed: An interesting way to get rid of evidence... destroy it along with your own ship. But nothing you do surprises me anymore. Here is your money. See ya around, Cap!
quest_smugglers_9_3_Cable_greeting: My scanners show that you are almost there.
quest_smugglers_9_3_Cable_ME_yes: An active volcano? Are you crazy?!
quest_smugglers_9_3_Cable_ME_no: A volcano? No problem, I can deal with it.
quest_smugglers_9_3_Cable_NPC_yes: Don't worry! Make sure the weather is good, get as high as possible, wait for the release signal and then fly through and drop the cargo. That's it; I'm sure you'll manage!
quest_smugglers_9_3_Cable_NPC_no: What a great attitude! I like it! Get rid of the load and the money is yours.
quest_smugglers_9_4_Cable_completed: It's done. It was nice working with you, Cap. Come over time to time, I might find a job for you. Oh yes, the reward. Don't waste it. See ya!
Passenger_Smuggler_Cable_TakeMe_Bad: {Say}Oh, who do I see? You have balls to come here again. Ok, let's forget about it. I need to leave this place. As soon as possible. I will pay you well. {/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Cable_TakeMePlease: {Say}Cap, don't be a dick! It's five minutes away. the easiest money in your career. Deal? {/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Cable_OpenCargoIn: {Say}Open up, it's cold out here! {System}[IVT_Ship_Cargo_OpenClose]{/System} Let's move!{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Haydam_TakeMe: {Say}I understand that Cable sent you. Open the hatch, it's time to move out.{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Haydam_TakeMePlease: {Say}Bro, I'm starting to get nervous. Let's move before the security guards suspect something.{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Haydam_OpenCargoIn: {Say}Bro, I'm starting to get nervous. Let's move before the security guards suspect something.{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_1_TakeMe: {Say}Hey! Finally, someone's here! Help me, I'm here in the gorge. Damn, seems like a pair of ribs is broken. {/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_1_OpenCargo: {Say}Man, I'm bleeding here. Open the hold. Help me! {/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_2_TakeMePle: {Say}So, are we going? Hurry up! My friends might still be alive, and they need our help!{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_2_OpenCargo: {Say}Seems like you forgot to open the hold.{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_2_WrongCity: {Say}Are we here to refuel? If I'm not mistaken, Cable is waiting for us on Orient lab
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_3_1_TakeMe: {Say}The guys are ready to move! We are waiting for you, Captain.{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_3_1_TakeMeP: {Say}You done? The mine won't capture itself! We have a job to do.{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_3_1_OpenCar: {Say}You done? The mine won't capture itself! We have a job to do.{/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_3_1_WrongCi: {Say}Arrived? Captain, this is not the mine... Stop screwing around, alright? {/Say}
Passenger_Smuggler_Cable_FlightComplete: We made it. So, how does it feel to be on the other side of the law? Not that you have much of choice... Work with me and get rich, or Raglor becomes your grave. If I don't kill you, the police will.
Smuggler_Cable_TakeMe_Good: Hey, man. I just found a great job for you, but there were some problems because of the whisky you delivered. I have to get out of here as soon as possible. Do me a favor, take me to {Quest}'NileSTAR'{/Quest}! I will pay you well.
quest_smugglers_2_3_Cable_greeting_2: Do not fool around. We are now on the same side. If you land, they will kill us both.
Passenger_Smuggler_Cable_Abroad: Take Cable to the destination point
HUD_Passenger_Smuggler_Cable_Abroad: Take Cable to the destination point
Passenger_Smuggler_Haydam_WrongCity: {Say}Bro, Cable is not here. Apparently, you mixed up the destination. Or do you suggest me to get out?{/Say}
quest_smugglers_2_2_1_Cable_greeting: Who do I see? You have balls to come here again. Actually, you are right on time. I need to leave this place now. Take me to {Quest}'Nilestar'{/Quest}. I will pay you well.
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_invite:
Hey, have you seen this strange man on the Security Base?
Yep, he tried to offer me some job.
Sounded like easy money.
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_1_1:
Did you enjoy last night?
Yes, it was wonderful. The sky was romantic and the wine so tasty.
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_1_2:
It was nice. Remember when we got that drunk last time?
Say "Thank you" to me and my suppliers.
Only if you promise to bring more stuff and for free next time. Ok, I'm kidding...
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_2_1:
Well, well, the cops inspected the hold for the third time today.
It seems like they are getting more suspicious lately.
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_3_1:
Did anyone notice some lout in laboratory storage?
I think I know who you're talking about. I never saw him before recently.
He screamed at me when I asked him what he was doing there. Asshole!
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_4_1:
This is Chris Audrey from Dagger Squad, no sign of the criminals in the area.
Roger that. He vanished like he never existed.
Damn!  Well, we'll get 'em next time...
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_4_2:
Guys, is everything ok with your radio and navigation?
What? I don't know what you mean.
Yes, it knocks sometimes. He is not the first one who has had such problems.
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_5_1:
Another successful trip. Passengers: easy, profitable and fun!
Hmm, i don't know Stive. I've met such garbage people.
Don't be so antisocial, Sean!
Get bent!
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_6_1:
Mmmm great, such shitty weather. And what am I supposed to do? Sit tight and do nothing?
Sounds reasonable. Or you can try to fly low under it. But if you crash, I never said it!
Hmm, with my skills... but I might have to try it one time...
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_6_2:
Finally some light. It felt like this storm would last forever!
Have you heard about this crazy man in the north? He flew between the rocks. I prefer to weather the weather, haha!
Or someone stupid could...
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_7_1:
And what is it?
If they knew, we would not be asked to take it from there.
Why me? Let's flip a coin.
Sorry man.
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_8_1:
Hey guys, have you seen it? A spacecraft exploded in the upper atmosphere, fragments scattered all over Raglor!
What?!
Yeah, it was a huge disaster. I hope someone survived...
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_8_2:
What was that? This doesn't happen every day.
Anything might happen. Technical failure, human error...
Maybe someone shot them down.
Are you crazy? It was a passenger transport. There were no valuable goods.
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_9_1:
Guys, what the hell? I brought some cargo to the mine, but they wouldn't let me sell it. And they wouldn't tell me why!
Yes, I heard that something strange is happening there.
They didn't even allow me to refuel. What should I do now?
Radio_Dialog_Pilots_Smugglers_9_2:
What is going on with the price of ore? I had to refuse an order.
Yep, it's skyrocketed. Seems like the corporations are playing shadow games.
Losers! I made a lot of money off of that deal. And bought a new ship!
Asshole!
quest_main_ending_Captain_2_yes_1:
Sounds scary and very unusual. Although, some pilots complained about strange animal sounds on the radio. Have a nice day.
*Step away* Sergeant! Take a squad and check R2J18 sector. Move, move!
quest_main_ending_Captain_2_no_1: Well, nice! Fewer problems, less headache. Have a good flight.
quest_main_ending_Baz_2_2_failed: Captain, security has reported to me that the cargo is still at the station. Next time, at least let me know if you decide to fly away.
quest_main_ending_Baz_2_failed: Captain, we lost your signal. Are you alright? Captain?
quest_main_ending_2_aliens: Captain, intercepted atypical signal! Signal source unknown. Running the audio file.
quest_main_ending_Baz_3_greeting: Captain, this is Frank. This is the last time I'll ask you for help, I promise. We need building materials. You already know the details.
quest_main_ending_Baz_3_completed: Thank you, Captain! You helped us to finish the project on time.
quest_main_ending_Eric_4_1_greeting: Hello, Captain! I haven't seen you for a long time. Frank asked me to get a special item... So, I managed it! Please pick it up from the {Quest}Borey{/Quest}.
quest_main_ending_Eric_4_1_completed: Nice, you have the cargo! Deliver it to Big Crater. It is very urgent, no time for paperwork.
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_2_completed: Captain, glad to see you! Sorry, I was busy, there is such a commotion .. It seems we are finally launching our object!
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_2_failed:
Damn it, Captain! Why did it take so long? Cargo should have been delivered a long time ago! Wh...
* Disconnected *
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_2_ME_yes: Hey. I have your package here.
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_2_ME_no: Ok. I will not distract you.
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_2_NPC_yes: What? What are you talking about? I did not order anything. Very suspicious ... Okay, unload it somewhere and we'll figure it out later. Nobody has time right now.
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_2_NPC_no: Thank you. Choose a better place and get ready. Something's gonna happen now.
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_4_greeting: Cap, what the hell are you still doing there? Do not disrupt our launch: fly away to a safe distance, please!
quest_main_ending_Frank_4_4_completed: Fine. Seatbelt. Focus your attention on the object!
quest_main_ending_Frank_5_invite_greetin: Captain, this is Frank. {Quest}Come to the Big Crater{/Quest}, we are launching our project! You did alot to make this happen. Hurry up!
quest_main_ending_Frank_5_invite_complet: Oh, hey. Get comfortable, we're about to launch this thing. And make sure that you are far enough away!
GUI_EndGameCredits_Text_Continue: Thank you for completing the main storyline! :)
GUI_EndGameCredits_Text_Intro:
Here our story ends.
The next one is coming,
but it will be on a different PLANET and time.
quest_main_ending_Frank_1_1_greeting: Hi, this is Frank again, and we need your help. Do you remember the radars that you placed for us? It seems that some of them are malfunctioning. Pick up {Quest}Bazz{/Quest} at the {Quest}Big Crater mine{/Quest}
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_1_completed: I'm on board, Captain. We can {Quest}move{/Quest}.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_2_completed: We are on the spot. {Quest}Don't take off{/Quest} for a while. I need to do a couple of tests.
quest_main_ending_1_Baz_crushed: Oh my, Darvin! Cap, be careful, we almost crashed.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_3_completed: Wierd. The device works perfectly, there are no problems. But something is jamming the signal. {Quest}the source{/Quest} should be nearby... Alright, I figured it out. Let's check what is there.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_4_completed: We are on the spot. The device looks extremely interesting. Give me some time and don't disturb me.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_4_emitter_warnin: Captain, attention! Unknown radiation detected! Ship control system malfunctions are possible.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_5_completed: Amazing ... Never seen anything like it. Those technologies are completely unknown to me, although I am familiar with all advanced inventions of mankind. This sample should be explored, Captain: {Quest}Load it on board{/Quest}.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_6_completed: This device is too dangerous to take to the main base. Therefore, we will deliver it to the laboratory for {Quest}research{/Quest}. That should significantly reduce the risk. Sending you the {Quest}coordinates{/Quest}, Captain.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_6_failed: Ahhh, be careful! You can not even imagine the value of this little thing! Well, it seems you broke it ... I guess we'll try to research it anyway...
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_reveal: Amazing! I already have preliminary analysis results. We are very lucky that we discovered it now. Violation of air defense systems is nothing compared to what this thing can do.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_reveal_yes: Air defense? We were checking the radars, no?
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_reveal_yes_1: What did I say? Radars, of course radars! Never mind. By the way, you did a good job. I will contact the financial department, they will pay you well.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_reveal_no_1: Great job. I will contact the financial department, they will pay you well.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_reveal_bad: These technologies are truly unique!  Violation of air defense systems is nothing compared to what this thing can do.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_reveal_bad_yes_1: What did I say? Radars, of course radars! Never mind. By the way, you did a good job. I will contact the financial department, they will pay you well.
quest_main_ending_Baz_1_reveal_bad_no_1: By the way, about the payment ... even though you broke the device, you did everything else properly. I will contact the financial department, they will pay you.
quest_main_ending_Baz_2_1_greeting_bad: Hello, Captain! Finally, you got in touch. Somehow, not only you survived, but also the cargo. I had to patch it up a bit, but the damage is not critical. Will you deliver it?
quest_main_ending_Baz_2_1_greeting: Good afternoon, Captain. I have news about that interesting device what we found. And I need some help. Come to {Quest}Big Crater{/Quest} if interested, we will discuss everything there.
quest_main_ending_Baz_2_2_greeting: Hey, we made a series of tests, but it is not enough. We have to deliver it to Earth for further research. This is your assignment for today.
quest_main_ending_Baz_2_3_greeting: Captain. This cargo is very important, the safety of it has the highest priority. Deliver it to the {Quest}Security Base{/Quest}, SWAT will take care of it from there.
quest_main_ending_Captain_2: Welcome! Were the any troubles? Did you notice anything strange?
quest_main_ending_Captain_2_yes: Yes, I heard some terrible sounds on the backup frequency.
Passenger_Head_Engineer_Baz_TakeMe_Good: {Say}Hello, I'm Bazz Dokuchaev... Wait, haven't we already met? It's nice to work with you again. We have to check each radar and figure out which one is broken. So, let's go! {/Say}
Passenger_Head_Engineer_Baz_TakeMe_Bad: {Say}Oh, it's you again. I hope this time we are not going to have problems. It's a challenging job. Let's go! {/Say}
Passenger_Head_Engineer_Baz_TakeMePlease: {Say}Hey Cap, are you ready to begin? {/Say}
Passenger_Head_Engineer_Baz_OpenCargoIn: {Say}What are you waiting for? {System}[IVT_Ship_Cargo_OpenClose]{/System} Open the hatch and let's go!{/Say}
Passenger_Head_Engineer_Baz_WrongCity: {Say}Cap? Are you sure we are in the right place? I don't see any radars. {/Say}
Passenger_Head_Engineer_Baz_Abroad: Take the engineer to the destination
HUD_Passenger_Head_Engineer_Baz_Abroad: Take the engineer to the destination

GUI_WeatherDescription_NormalWeather: Partly cloudy in the upper layers. Light gusts of wind.

GUI_WeatherDescription_StormWeather: {Red}Dangerous{/Red} weather in the middle layers of the atmosphere.
UniversalTuner_EcoPower_Descr: The "Corsair X" processor is a chip for the ship’s energy system, increasing power due to the resource of engines and huge overspending of energy. (Illigal)
GUI_HangarPaintsWindow_CurrentConsumptio: Current energy consumption at full thrust
Head_Engineer_Baz_talker_descr: A geologist from the metropolis. He works with many private corporations represented in Raglore.
Unknown_Source_descr: The signal source is unknown. Failed to get the image
Canyon_JP_descr: The informal leader of hooligans - Racer
Passenger_Inspector_descr: A cadastral inspector from the metropolis. No one will run away from the bureaucratic machine.
Passenger_Hardmaterialmining_descr: An energetic entrepreneur who stands out among the sullen miners and scientists of Raglor.
Passenger_descr: Temporary travel companion, in a hurry
Tourist_descr: A tourist who wants to see the sights and beauty of the Raglor wildlife.
Normal_Weather_Prediction: A clear sky and light breeze are expected.
Calm_Weather_Prediction: Wonderful flying weather is expected. Cloudless and windless sky.
Cloudy_Weather_Prediction: Increased humidity is expected. Partly foggy and light rainfall.
SandStorm_Weather_Prediction: FORECAST: Attention! A sandstorm expected. Long flights do not recommend.
Storm_Weather_Prediction: FORECAST: The approach of the cyclone predicted. Very strong gusts of wind. Long flights do not recommend.
MCC_md_Hostess_descr: Flight Control Center Dispatcher. Meets new colony pilots, and also helps them in every way with useful information and news.
Colonist_Astlan_descr: An ordinary colony officer responsible for the shipment of the goods.
Trader_Astlan_descr: Successful businessman. Helps newbie pilots gain experience by giving simple assignments, on which he makes good money.
Crushed_Pilot_descr: A colleague, one of the hundreds of frontier pilots who arrived at the colony in search of easy money.
Fungus_Tibald_descr: Senior Employee at KapuInc. Biologist, mycologist. He was urgently sent to Astlan due to the potential xeno-threat.
Smuggler_Cable_descr: Mysterious businessman, possibly related to the black market. Pays a lot for relatively simple work
Canyon_Horacio_descr: Member of the top leadership of the KapuInc conglomerate.
Canyon_Clarence_descr: One of the largest shareholders of 'Monte & Co'. A stern man of conservative views.
Repurchase_1_ending: Great, the construction will be completed on time. Thanks for the delivery, pilot, it was nice to have business with you.
Repurchase_2_ending: I am glad that you decided to cooperate with me. This item will be a wonderful addition to my collection.
Meteorological_center_descr: The colony meteorology service warns of storms, sandstorms, and other weather troubles.
Meteorological_center_forecast_descr: Meteorological Service Division. Their job is to predict dangerous weather hazards and warn the inhabitants of the colony.
Smuggler_Jonathan_descr: Quartermaster of Quarry M&T. Closely connected with the criminal world of the colony. For a tidy sum you can get almost anything.
Canyon_Romulo_descr: Senior manager of 'Monte & Co' Corporation. This guy can always find work for you.
Canyon_Julia_Talker_descr: Leading biologist KapuInc. At Raglore, he is engaged in advanced research of the Canyon.
Repurchase_1_greeting: Hello! I was informed that recently you acquired Carbon Constructions. We have to hand over the object, but new building materials in delay. I will be very glad to redeem your cargo. Of course, at an increased rate. If interested, deliver the goods to M&T Corp.
Repurchase_2_greeting: Good afternoon. My name is Donald Abrams, maybe you heard about me. I own a network of private museums, and I was interested in one sample - and now it is in your hold. I am ready to buy it for the real credits. Waiting for you in the North-1.
Repurchase_3_greeting: Hey. Are you the one who recently bought new drones? Listen, I was really looking forward to this delivery, and you took it. Could you sell them to me? I will be very grateful to you. My workshop is located at Metallic-N. Thanks in advance!
Repurchase_3_ending: Oh, thank you so much! Unfortunately, things are going so-so in the workshop, and I can’t pay you extra for that. However, I will talk with my colleague in the IT department, and he will give you access to the experimental upgrade. Thanks again!
Events_Engine_warning: Attention! Engine problems detected. For a complete diagnosis, you need to land the aircraft and turn off the propulsion system.
Events_Engine_Complete: The analysis is complete. The reason is an abnormal engine overheating due to a malfunction of the dust filter. The filter is automatically replaced, you can continue the flight.
Events_Engine_Failed: DANGER! Critical engine damage! Call a Service drone or visit the nearest hangar.
Events_News_1: News. A meteorite threatening Kaye-14 was destroyed from a safe distance, no casualties. The new colony Oceanis is developing very rapidly, scientists promise a significant scientific breakthrough thanks to the study of the local fauna. That's it for today.
Events_News_2: Finance News! Shares of new Emilian shipbuilding star continue to skyrocket. The course of CR to EUSD continues to grow, 7.689.
Events_News_3: News. The Universalis 12 sector is still turbulent. Ships are disappearing, raids on mining towns have become more frequent. Society requires decisive action from the government.
Events_Env_Volcano: Attention. You are approaching a large volcano. High levels of ash and dust in the air can adversely affect the operation of ship systems. However, on the landscape, you can find interesting ore
Events_Env_GreenGeyzer: Attention, an interesting object. Presumably, the gas contained in the underground pocket reacts with the substances contained in the air, hence the bizarre visual fractals. Obviously, the phenomenon itself and its post-products can have scientific value.
News_Agency_descr: Perhaps the most famous and authoritative news agency in the galaxy. The news provided by the ship’s AI assistant is taken from this source.
Bad_Weather_Prediction: FORECAST: Strong wind is expected after a while, especially in the high layers of the atmosphere. Be careful!
Cargo_Dead: Loading is not possible: Cargo was destroyed
GUI_WeatherDescription_DefaultWeather:
Ideal weather for flights.
Excellent visibility, calm or very light wind.
Ship_Assistant_Scarab_descr: The voice interface of the Scarab - AI assistant. Informs about ship malfunctions and provides environmental data
Ship_Assistant_Ox_descr: The voice interface of the Oxv-4 - AI assistant. Informs about ship malfunctions and provides environmental data
Ship_Assistant_Ballena_descr: The voice interface of the Ballena - AI assistant. Informs about ship malfunctions and provides environmental data
Ship_Assistant_Capsule_descr: The voice interface of the rescue capsule - AI assistant. Informs about ship malfunctions and provides environmental data
Brigadier_Biggun_descr: The foreman of a construction site Big Crater. Contact him to get a job.
