quest_smugglers_3_1_Cable_greeting_extra: Wow! How did you survive? You know what, that was our last flight.
Passenger_Trip_Message_1: Hi! I'd like to go on an excursion to {NPC_DestinationMapName}. After that, I'd like to return here. Are you up for it?
Passenger_Trip_Message_2: Hey there! A friend of mine told me to check out {NPC_DestinationMapName}. I'd like to return here after I'm done there. Does that work for you?
Passenger_Trip_Message_3: Hello! I've wanted to see {NPC_DestinationMapName} for quite a while, and now I finally have the chance! Could you take me there? And would you bring me back here too?
Passenger_Trip_Again_Message: I'm still up for seeing {NPC_DestinationMapName}. You haven't changed your mind, have you?
Passenger_Wrong_Place_Message: This isn't right, I need to get to {NPC_DestinationMapName}
Passenger_Open_Cargo_Out_Message: I'm ready to disembark. Can you open the hold?,
Passenger_At_Place_Message: It looks like we're in the right place. Can I look around?
Passenger_Ready_Message_1: Ok, I'm in! We can go now. I can't wait to see {NPC_DestinationMapName}.
Passenger_Ready_Message_2: I'm in, let's roll! Set a course for {NPC_DestinationMapName}, Captain!
Passenger_Ready_Message_3: It's cozier in here than I expected. Let's fly! We need to get to {NPC_DestinationMapName}.
Passenger_Take_Me_Home_Message_1: I think I've seen everything. I'd like to go home.
Passenger_Take_Me_Home_Message_2: This exceeds all expectations! But, unfortunately, it's time to go home...
Passenger_Take_Me_Home_Message_3: It's completely different in real life. What a great adventure. Anyway, it's time to go home.
Passenger_Ready_Message_Home: I am inside. Let's go to {NPC_Behav_DestinationMapName}.
Passenger_Wrong_Home_City_Message: This is not where you picked me up! I need to return to {NPC_Behav_DestinationMapName}.
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Volcano_1: So beautiful! Do you know how this natural wonder came to be?
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Volcano_2: Such a picturesque view! I wonder about the origin of this object...
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Volcano_3: What an unbelievable sight. I should to take a couple of photos... Captain, would you know something about the origin of this place?
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Geyser_1: So beautiful! Do you know how this natural wonder came to be?
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Geyser_2: Such a picturesque view! I wonder about the origin of this object...
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Geyser_3: What an unbelievable sight. I should to take a couple of photos... Captain, would you know something about the origin of this place?
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Canyon_1: So beautiful! Do you know how this natural wonder came to be?
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Canyon_2: Such a picturesque view! I wonder about the origin of this object...
Passenger_Riddle_Message_Canyon_3: What an unbelievable sight. I should to take a couple of photos... Captain, would you know something about the origin of this place?
Passenger_Riddle_Answer_1: Giant tectonic plates clash and deform, forcing subterranean magma to breach the surface.
Passenger_Riddle_Answer_2: Upon reaching the boiling point, ground water forms a powerful discharge of liquid and steam that has been working its way to the surface for centuries.
Passenger_Riddle_Answer_3: It is assumed that large rivers were in full force here millions of years ago. What we can see now are their coulees and the remaining small streams.
Passenger_Riddle_2_Message_Volcano: It's very beautiful... What unbelievable potential! Do you think we could use this natural wonder to the benefit of humanity?
Passenger_Riddle_2_Message_Canyon: It's very beautiful... What unbelievable potential! Do you think we could use this natural wonder to the benefit of humanity?
Passenger_Riddle_2_Message_Geyser: It's very beautiful... What unbelievable potential! Do you think we could use this natural wonder to the benefit of humanity?
Passenger_Riddle_2_Answer_1: We can use it for energy production. Installation of turbines above these objects has already taken place at some factories here on Raglor.
Passenger_Riddle_2_Answer_2: Such objects are perfect for geological research that helps us to develop a better understanding of the causes of numerous natural phenomena.
Passenger_Riddle_2_Answer_3: Narrow spaces like this are perfect for spreading nets to catch local fauna.
Passenger_Riddle_3_Message_Volcano: This is so exciting... I am thrilled! Captain, could you tell me some stories about this place?
Passenger_Riddle_3_Message_Canyon: This is so exciting... I am thrilled! Captain, could you tell me some stories about this place?
Passenger_Riddle_3_Message_Geyser: This is so exciting... I am thrilled! Captain, could you tell me some stories about this place?
Passenger_Riddle_3_Answer_1: Just look at this color! Supposedly the chemical composition of the matter was affected by an alien shipwreck that took place in ancient times.
Passenger_Riddle_3_Answer_2: They say that in satellite photos, this object and the landscape surrounding it resemble a dragon. Isn't that curious?
Passenger_Riddle_3_Answer_3: One pilot I know told me a tall tale of how this place caused the death of a whole tourist expedition!
Passenger_Riddle_3_Answer_4: I don't know what I could say to entertain you.
Passenger_Riddle_Correct_Answer: You know a lot! You should consider working as tour guide.
Passenger_Riddle_Correct_Answer_2: Indeed! You definitely have a penchant for this business!
Passenger_Riddle_Correct_Answer_3_1: Aliens? This is so exciting... The color is indeed unusual!
Passenger_Riddle_Correct_Answer_3_2: My goodness! What if this is the remains of an ancient civilization that lived here before us?
Passenger_Riddle_Correct_Answer_3_3: Jeepers! Stop it, Captain! I've never liked horror stories.
HUD_Passengers_MoveOutReady_Home: Waiting for the cargo door to open.
Passenger_Far_From_Targets_Message: This is taking a lot longer than I'd expected. Are we heading the right way?,
Passenger_Radiation_Message: I have a headache. Can we fly lower?
PassengerTakeMeMessage_1: Good afternoon! I need to get to {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Can I count on your help?
PassengerTakeMePleaseMessage_1: I'm sorry for asking you again, but I still need to get to {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Have you changed your mind?
PassengersWrongCityMessage_1: Do you have some business here? I just need to get to {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Should I get off here though?"
PassengerOpenCargoInMessage_1: I am sorry, Captain, but it seems that you forgot to open the passenger ramp.
PassengersOpenCargoOutMessage_1: Well, looks like we've arrived. Could you please let me out?
PassengersReadyMessage_1: I am in, Captain. I think we can leave for {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Unless there's something else you need to do here.
PassengersCompleteMessage_1: Thank you very much! I have transferred {NPC_Mem_RewardForPassanger} credits to your account, as promised. Best of luck!
PassengerTakeMeMessage_5: Good afternoon. I am interested in getting a taxi ride to {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Are you available?
PassengerTakeMePleaseMessage_5: Are you still here? Could it be that you changed your mind? I need to get to {NPC_DestinationMapName}.
PassengersWrongCityMessage_5: I hope you heard me right... I need to go to {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Could it be that you have some urgent business and I need to get off?
PassengerOpenCargoInMessage_5: Since we've struck a deal, it's about time you let me get on board.
PassengersOpenCargoOutMessage_5: Looks like we've arrived. Please unlock the exit.
PassengersReadyMessage_5: All good, we can leave for {NPC_DestinationMapName}. The weather is quite peculiar today...
PassengersCompleteMessage_5: Well, thanks. The total of {NPC_Mem_RewardForPassanger} has been transferred to your account. Have a nice day.
Astlan_Passenger_WrongCityMessage: I need to get to Nord, but this is not the right place. Should I still get off?
GUI_HUD_Charge_Time_Value_TextHelp: estimated flight time with current charge,
GUI_HUD_Charge_Distance_Value_TextHelp: calculated flight distance (km) with current charge,
MeteoCenter_Message_CalmWeather: Attention: Flight conditions are favourable. Wind is calm.
MeteoCenter_Message_CloudyWeather: Attention: Overcast conditions present. Visibility is significantly reduced. AR more recomended {btnX}[IVT_Ship_ToggleWinds]{/btnX}
MeteoCenter_BadWeather_Warning: The approaching cyclone brings strong gusts of wind.. Be careful.
MeteoCenter_Low_Rad_Warning: Attention: SKI level will reduce soon. We recommend all pilots descend below {Red}1 km{/Red}!.
quest_canyon_1_1_greeting: Hello, Captain. I need your help. Deliver the equipment container to the mobile base.
quest_canyon_1_1_ME_yes: What base are you talking about?
quest_canyon_1_1_NPC_yes: It's a base nearby. My colleagues accidentally discovered deposits of an unknown mineral in the nearby canyon. The base isn't fully completed yet, so they might have some good contracts for you.
quest_canyon_1_1_completed: Cargo is on board. {Quest}Base coordinates{/Quest} received. Be careful, flight conditions in the canyon are tough. If you make a successful delivery, come back and we'll pay you more.
quest_canyon_1_2_completed: Finally, someone delivered the equipment. Thank you! My name is Romulo, I am a supply manager of 'Monte & Co'. If you would like to make some easy money, you can make some more deliveries here for us. We need {Quest}building materials{/Quest}.",
quest_canyon_1_teaser_1: Oh, have you seen the beauty which surrounds us here? If not, have a fly around! You will be amazed by what this canyon offers.
quest_canyon_1_teaser_2: This place will be heaven. The canyon is full of minerals, flora and fauna. We are going to build laboratories, farms, tourist centers, mines. If you are interested in helping, of course...
quest_OX_flymode_warning: Attention, Captain! Switch your flight mode to Airplane mode {btnX}<F>{/btnX} or else your chances of of reaching Raglor are 0%.
quest_fungus_1_1_greeting: Captain! We have an emergency here. Deliver {Quest}the goods{/Quest} from the Port to the Bora laboratory.
quest_fungus_1_1_NPC_yes: Code Red announced in Astlan. Strange objects have appeared all over the island. Military aviation is on the way. Your job is to deliver equipment to the scientists so they can figure out what these objects are.
quest_fungus_1_2_completed: Hi, and thanks for the shipment. My name is Tybalt. I've just arrived from Atlantis, and already we're in such a mess...
quest_fungus_1_2_ME_no: We have fun here. Well, good luck.
quest_fungus_1_2_NPC_yes: The planet OCR-14 is commonly called Atlantis. It's a giant planet completely covered by ocean. I was the head of research there, focussing on marine life forms. So, you guess what we are going to do here.
quest_fungus_1_2_NPC_no: Wait, wait! Don't leave us here. What if this species is aggressive?
quest_fungus_1_2_failed: Did you lose the cargo? We've cancelled the contract. Go to {Quest}Bora{/Quest} and help the scientist. This time, don't mess up!,
quest_fungus_2_1_greeting: So, now we can start field research. Please, find {Quest}a sample{/Quest} of our guest and deliver it to me.
quest_fungus_2_1_NPC_yes: Do not worry, the rumors are highly exaggerated.  I'm the one who is taking all the risk here!  Usually, such creatures are completely harmless.  However, many of my colleagues have ended up in the hospital after inhaling spores or other toxins.  Just be careful.  If you see or hear anything strange, leave this place right away!
quest_fungus_2_2_completed: You got the sample! Very well, deliver it to {Quest}Bora{/Quest}. Don't be afraid of the soldiers. The base is in the danger zone, we have to be ready to defend it.
quest_fungus_2_2_greeting: Squad, Code Red! The object is approaching the landing pad! Captain, no sudden movements!
quest_fungus_2_3_completed: Oh my god, it's like you're carrying a nuclear warhead.
quest_fungus_2_4_completed: That's all! I will send you a report as soon as we have some results. I am sure it will be interesting.
quest_fungus_2_5_completed: Captain, I have some news. The chemical composition of the sample is a 97% match with one of the species I studied on Atlantis.
quest_fungus_2_2_extra: Wait a second... You're not from Thomas? OK then, here's the situation. I'm Tybalt, Lead Biologist. Have you seen those mushrooms that appeared overnight? The government hired me to determine what they are.
quest_fungus_2_2_ME_no: My job is to deliver and sell. That's it.
quest_fungus_2_2_NPC_yes: That's what we are working on. Thomas had to hire someone for sample delivery. I thought it was you. We have to do some tests to figure out what we are dealing with.
quest_fungus_2_2_NPC_no: I am not gonna waste your time than with boring details. Just deliver the samples to Bora.
GUI_HangarUpgradesWindow_UpgradeAction_R: replace with a surcharge of {VALUE} credits
GUI_HangarShipsWindow_ShipAction_Trade: exchange your ship with a surcharge of {VALUE} credits
GUI_HangarWindow_ToExitDescription: Exit the hangar or change camera view
ScarabHullBase_Descr: Standard Scarab 297 fuselage. Provides a moderate amount of radiation protection
ScarabWingsBase_Descr: Standard wing with a basic configuration. Improves maneuverability at high speeds in VTOL mode.
ScarabEnginesBase_Descr: These PaulGears engines have come installed on civilian Scarab models since 2196.  They are not shielded against dust and water contamination.
ScarabChassisBase_Descr: Standard lightweight PG Landing gears. Will flood if immersed in water.
GUI_HangarUpgradesWindow_RepairDescripti: The automated system repairs all damage to the ship.
OxEngineBase_Descr: Standard BaseLine Ox engines. These engines have a basic design for ease of manufacture. Designed to be cost efficient above all else.
OxChassisBase_Descr: Standard Ox  landing gears. Equipped with four-axis swivel mechanism.
OxWingsStandart_Descr: Variable configuration wing with two slit flaps. Allows you to instantly switch between VTOL and Airplane mode. (Standard),
OxWingsDrag_Descr: The Emilian Slinker is a revolutionary wing construction using lightweight materials which reduces the overall aircraft weight and drag. "Slinker: High Speed Guaranteed!"
OxWingsPower_Descr: Innovative wings made by Taurus TECH with powerful flap actuators, Colossus-H ailerons and increased working aerodynamic surfaces.
OxWingsPower2_Descr: New version of the Titan wings made by Taurus TECH. Dramatically increases wing lift compared to the Colossus wing.
OxFuelTankExt2_Descr: Suspended Stri-X4D fast-charge batteries from H&C hold almost double the charge capacity of standard batteries.
OxFuelTankProtector_Descr: Lightweight version of PRO-I batteries. Used in sport ship modifications.
OxFuelTankIntExtendor_Descr: Emilian's custom SuperNova battery extender is an excellent solution to increase charge capacity without increasing drag. The use of para-aramid fibers in the product also provides a noticable redution in weight.
OxEnginePower1_Descr: PaulGears confidently dominates the market of powerful engines. The main problem of increasing engine power is the rise in generated heat. This model of the L-Barbarian was able to solve this thanks to the new LMS909 heat exchanger.
OxEnginePower2_Descr: The use of the Double-G Cycle based around the Knightbanger principle allowed the engineers at PaulGears to raise the bar for power in their flagship L-Barbarian engines even higher. In addition, a branched ventilation system has increased resistance to dust and bad weather conditions.
OxEnginePower3_Descr: Advanced EVO2 engines made by H&C are the most powerful on the market. Featuring a radical forward-looking design, they provide incredible power and superior reliability.
OxEngineConsum_Descr: Low energy consumption Longb0w-21g4 engines by Taurus TECH are designed with passenger service aircraft in mind, where ability to carry a heavy payload is not a significant factor.
OxCargoSafe1_Descr: XMWay damper system manufactured by Atlantic Solutions improves stability of the cargo compartment. The designers adapted their line of gyro-compensators used in oceanic cargo ships for use in aircraft.
OxCargoSafe2_Descr: SkyWyrm v0.4 GAK forced air gyro-compensators by H&C protect your fragile cargo from damage during high-G manoeuvers. The best system of its class on the market.
OxCargoWeight1_Descr: The Beast-OB modification from Taurus TECH Corporation uses a revolutionary system of magnetic fasteners, allowing cargo arcraft to increase the maximum mass of transported goods.
OxCargoWeight2_Descr: An innovative design by the engineers at the Emilian Corporation, OBS-Gargoyle cargo fasteners secure fragile loads while adding minimal weight to the aircraft. Details of how this is achieved are proprietary.
OxChassisHard_Descr: ARRIV-JP landing gear made by Taurus TECH facilitates transport of heavy loads. Rigidity and high mobility are achieved by circulating a nitrogen-argon mix through the shock absorbers.
OxChassisLight_Descr: Firefly-APEX ultralight landing gear. Emilian engineers achieved a surprisingly low weight solution by using an innovative design incorporating scadium tensioners.
OxChassisDrive_Descr: The JKL-2 module was designed for field work in rough terrain. Significantly increases mobility and allows the ship to move confidently over uneven surfaces.
BallenaHullBase_Descr: Standard hull. By using a composite, ultrastrong three-dimensional polymer, engineers created a robust hull with high radiation resistance.
Ballena_ChassisGroup_Descr: Standard EasyGo hard shock absorbers cushion the landing of ships with heavy loads on board.
BallenaWingsStandart_Descr: Standard wings that are lightweight yet relatively strong and stable in flight.
BallenaEngineBase_Descr: Standard engines installed on Ballena heavy transport ships. Emilian Corporation engineers have developed new, highly efficient, multi-engined nacelles that provide a large volume of thrust, allowing for a ship capable of carrying superheavy loads.
BallenaEngineLight_Descr: The goal of the developers of the lightweight ButterFly engines was to add versatility to Ballena class aircraft.  Previously relegated to the cargo transport niche, these engines significantly expand the range of tasks the ship is suited to.
Ballena_ChassisGroupHard_Descr: H&C craftsmen upgraded the standard Ballena landing gear with magnetic hinges, creating an entirely new product called BRO. It provides a smooth landing even under the most adverse of weather conditions.
Ballena_ChassisGroupLight_Descr: UltraLight landing gear made by H&C. An upgraded design based on the Ox v3 military aircraft, it allows for a high degree of mobility.
BallenaWingsPower1_Descr: Experimental DualProPlus wings made by H&C can give the sluggish Ballena more nimble flight characteristics similar to the Ox.  The governments of several countries have already expressed interest in this design.
BallenaWingsLight_Descr: Emilian Corporation's superlight Single-Hover wings have been designed specifically to transport extremely heavy loads over short distances.  VTOL mode only.
BallenaFuelTankExt_Descr: Newest design from PaulGears uses bipolar routing technology, significantly increasing the initial energy supply.  Emilian Corporation is so impressed with the unit that they are considering licensing the design to include it in the basic configuration.
BallenaFuelTankExt2_Descr: Limited batch test sample of experimental Lucious-11 external batteries created by Taurus TECH. According to the creators, the device operates via monopolar quark routing.
BallenaFuelTankProtector_Descr: Originally intended for military use, the H&C B-guard modification drastically improves the strength and stability of power systems. According to the engineers, pilots with this unit installed will no longer need to worry about power failures in flight.
BallenaEnginePower1_Descr: The new PaulGears EVO2 engines are based on the dual compression method created by Clarks. The pinnacle of PaulGears engineering, these incredibly powerful engines manage to maintain a low power consumption ratio.
BallenaCargoWeight_Descr: A device developed by 'Monte & Co'. exclusively for internal company needs, specifically the transportation of super-heavy loads of mining products between continents. A limited consumer line was launched by the corporation for marketing purposes.
ScarabWingsPlane_Descr: Famous for its ship the Ballena, Emilian Experimental Development has also created this long-range modification for the Scarab. Using a unique wingtip technology known as "Melena", it allows the Scarab to fly in both VTOL and Airplane modes.
ScarabEnginesWaterProof_Descr: These NileStar engines made by Atlantic Solutions are remarkable for their hermetic design and closed valve system which allow them to operate underwater.
ScarabEnginesPower1_Descr: Mongoose class engines made by PaulGears are the most powerful on the market. Due to high-frequency pulses and additional reflectors, aircraft carrying capacity is significantly increased.
ScarabFuelTankAdditional_Descr: Suspended lightweight Gear-x2 batteries are the latest innovation in increased power capacity for small aircraft.
ScarabChassisAdvance_Descr: Thanks to a non-standard version of the suspension struts used, the 'Mule'  landing gears from the Taurus TECH company has established itself as the best in its class.
ScarabChassisWaterproof_Descr: A unique type of  landing gears with innovative technology known as AquaBlade which allows a ship to dive underwater to a depth of 50 meters.
ScarabChassisLight_Descr: Landing gears manufactured by Emilian Corporation. By using innovative composite materials, as well as the revolutionary simplification of the internal structure, the manufacturer was able to significantly reduce the weight of the  landing gears while maintaining its strength.
OxHullBase_Descr: Ox v4 is a converted civilian model of the military ship Ox v3, better known as the "Hell Diver." It is highly reliable and resistant to radiation.
OxWingsBase_Descr: First used in the second model of Ox aircraft, this standard variable configuration wing, H&C's OW2 has not changed since the Sector 6 Conflict.
GUI_HangarUpgradesWindow_RechargeDescrip: Hold the button until desired level of battery charge is reached. The weight of the ship will change in direct proportion to the amount of stored energy.
OxFuelTankExtDescription: Gear-X2 suspended batteries significantly increase ship flight range. While this model is focused on cargo carriers, PaulGears' engineers have noted that maximum allowable cargo weight is reduced.
GUI_CameraSettingsMenu_VTOL_CoefZ_Text: Camera shift intensity from flight speed (VTOL mode)
GUI_CameraSettingsMenu_Plane_CoefZ_Text: Camera shift intensity from flight speed (Airplane mode)
GUI_TradeWindow_ProductWarning_Fit: Cargo too large for current hold configuration.
GUI_TradeWindow_ProductWarning_Arm: Loading crane in use. Please stand by
GUI_TradeWindow_MapDescriptionCommon: Map displays the area around the current location. Select a specific product to display a list of places where it can be sold.
GUI_TradeWindow_MapDescriptionProduct: Displays a list of places where you can sell: {PRODUCT}
GUI_TradeWindow_MapDescriptionProductEmp: No point of sale found for: {PRODUCT}
quest_canyon_2_1_completed: I forgot to mention: you will have to fly along the canyon so I strongly recommend to come in a Scarab. That bird is ideal for flying through the tight natural corridors around here.
quest_canyon_2_2_greeting: Here you are. Listen carefully - you need to place three analyzing modules in three different locations. You can pick up the analyzers at the landing zone.
quest_canyon_2_2_ME_yes: What kind of modules? What are they for?
quest_canyon_2_2_NPC_yes: Oh, are you some kind of amateur scientist?  Well then, you must have noticed that this place is unique to Raglor. This also applies to the local soil. We are attempting to determine if it could be used for farming!
quest_canyon_2_3_completed_3: Allmost dropped it! Just kidding, it's all right.
quest_canyon_2_3_completed: Well done, Captain! As promised, here is a generous fee for your services. Please keep helping us to develop the base and do come visit me more often!
quest_canyon_3_1_completed: The top management of the corporation wishes me to make a detailed map of the canyon and I would like you to help me with that. You will find everything you need in {Quest}the loading area{/Quest}.
quest_canyon_3_1_ME_yes: What do I need to do?
quest_canyon_3_1_NPC_yes: A special map module is waiting for you in storage. You will have to fly through waypoints with that thing on board.
quest_canyon_3_2_completed: Be careful with the equipment - it is very fragile! Try not to damage the device as you will be billed for repairs.
quest_canyon_3_3_1_completed: Great, I have received the first section of data. Keep up the good work.
quest_canyon_3_4_greeting: Done! {Quest}Come back{/Quest} with the module and we'll see what you got.
quest_canyon_3_4_completed: It seems there are only a few small white spots. Wow, how did you manage to slip through such a narrow gap? I sent the reward to your account. See you later!
quest_canyon_4_1_greeting: Hello again, it's Romulo. I mentioned your skills to one of my new friends and she has a job for you. If you are interested {Quest}come to Canyon Central{/Quest}.
quest_canyon_4_1_completed: Here you are. In short, a detachment of biologists from the metropolis will soon join our group. And they want to hire you to transport them here. {Quest}Look in the hangar{/Quest} before departure.
quest_canyon_4_1_ME_yes: Slow down! Tell me the details.
quest_canyon_4_3_greeting: Hello! Are you the very talented pilot whom Romulo recommended? Okay girls, let's move!
quest_canyon_4_3_completed: We are inside. Let's head to {Quest}Canyon Central{/Quest}.
quest_canyon_4_4_extra: Such beauty!  Even this desert planet has some wonderful and romantic places.
quest_canyon_4_4_completed: That was fast! And not scary at all... Thank you! Stop by later; we will have some assignments for you. Oh, do you know where Romulo lives? Actually, nevermind...
quest_canyon_4_4_failed: Wait, we crashed? I thought you were an experienced pilot! Chris, call a rescue team from the base.
quest_canyon_5_1_greeting: Good afternoon, Captain. We have an unusual job for you, but I'm sure you'll like it! Come to Canyon Central when you get a chance.
quest_canyon_5_1_completed: Here you are. We need your help with some field research. We left an analyzing unit in storage. Please {Quest}pick it up{/Quest}.
quest_canyon_5_1_ME_yes: What kind of analysis is required?
quest_canyon_5_1_NPC_yes: We found some very unusual mineral samples. I bet that even a simple analysis of these samples will give us quite a bit of interesting info.
quest_canyon_5_2_completed: Here are your instructions: fly to the ore, hang in the air at a distance of 30-50 meters and wait for the module to complete its data collection. Then move to the next deposit and repeat the procedure. Really, it's all very simple.
quest_canyon_5_3_greeting: So, just to remind you - keep a short distance, hover in place and let the hardware do the rest. You will need to wait about ten seconds to get good data. Good luck!
quest_canyon_5_3_completed: Well done, all perfectly executed. Don't worry; if you suddenly crash the data from the module is duplicated to the cloud.
quest_canyon_5_3_failed: The analysis failed. Please try once more.
quest_canyon_5_4_completed: I think we have enough data for now. We have already uploaded it to our servers. {Quest}Please return the device intact{/Quest}. Dont jumble the shores, we have neighbours now, remember?
quest_canyon_5_5_completed: Great job, Captain! My team will immediately start analyzing the research results. You can continue to help develop the base by {Quest}trading with us{/Quest}.
quest_canyon_5_5_failed: Did you lose the device? Please don't tell me you sold it! Either way, I will have to deduct the cost of the module from your fee. You can continue to help develop the base by trading with us.
quest_canyon_6_1_greeting: Hi, Captain, you're right on time. We have a simple but profitable job. I need you to take my colleagues to a couple of places around the canyon. A VIP compartment is required, of course.
quest_canyon_6_1_NPC_yes: My colleagues and I are employees of Kapu Inc., a corporation specializing in light industry, biotechnology, genetic engineering and such. We work in the research department and have come here to study the local flora and fauna.
quest_canyon_6_2_greeting: Everyone on board? Great! I will send you the {Quest}coordinates{/Quest} of the of research spots.
quest_canyon_6_2_completed: This is my stop. Good luck!
quest_canyon_6_3_completed: There is still a lot of work ahead ...
quest_canyon_6_4_completed: This is a dangerous place... I would be very grateful if you could drop me in the middle of that cleft... But I won't insist if you think the maneuver would be too difficult.
quest_canyon_6_5_completed: Seems that I will need to get there myself. OK, thanks anyway!,
quest_canyon_6_6_completed: I am extremely grateful! I will insist that Julia pay you a bonus. Well, have a nice day.
quest_canyon_6_7_completed: Captain, you are aware that the companies 'Kapu Inc'. and 'Monte & Co'. are in a ruthless competition with each other? It seems that here in the Canyon, the competition has taken a dangerous turn. Romulo and I are trying to convince the leadership of both companies to cooperate, but so far no one will listen to us. I hope you are able to stay away from these troubles.
quest_canyon_6_failed: This is why we insist on having a secure passenger cabin! Flight conditions here are extremely unfavorable and require some serious skills from the pilot. Okay, you need to call in a rescue team...
quest_canyon_7_1_greeting: How are you, Captain? We have to re-place some {Quest}markers{/Quest} on objects of interest in the Canyon.
quest_canyon_7_1_NPC_yes: Yes. One of your colleagues had placed the markers, just as we asked, all over the Canyon.  But now, all of them have disappeared!  Unfortunately, you will need to repeat the procedure.
quest_canyon_7_2_greeting: You can start now. There is no direct evidence, but I know this was done by a competitor. Romulo says his guys are not involved, and of course I believe him...
quest_canyon_7_2_ME_yes: You do?  After all, he does work for 'Monte & Co'...
quest_canyon_7_2_NPC_yes: We are... good friends. He wouldn't lie to me.  It is unpleasant to admit, but my company's leadership also harms his corporation. This underground war doesn't make sence! Working together, we could achieve much more
quest_canyon_7_4_completed: Very good, all the markers are in place. Hopefully they will stay put!  This way we will be able to track the intruders.
quest_canyon_8_1_greeting: Hi. We ordered the latest marine research equipment, but there were some problems. {Quest}We need to figure out what's going on.{/Quest}
quest_canyon_8_1_NPC_no: Wonderful. I don't have many details; you'll need to head over there to get more information.
quest_canyon_8_2_greeting: Hello. Have you come for the equipment? We recently completed the last tests but the engines fell off the transport barge!  I'm afraid you will have to fish them out of the water yourself.
quest_canyon_8_2_ME_yes: And how exactly will I do that?
quest_canyon_8_2_NPC_yes: Don't worry, we just happen to be developing waterproof landing gear for the Ox! We don’t have a hangar, so we’ll have to take the equipment to another base.
quest_canyon_8_2_NPC_no: Please send my apologies to Mr. Romulo. And I can help you out - we have experimental waterproof landing gear for the Ox. We don’t have a hangar, so we’ll have to take the equipment to another base.
quest_canyon_8_3_completed: Great job, Captain, I knew I could rely on you!  I'm sure the miners will lift you onto their shoulders! They have not eaten anything for a long time except tasteless soy protein.
quest_canyon_8_2_failed: Damn it, Captain! I was just contacted by the supplier and they have cancelled the mission.
quest_canyon_9_1_greeting: Good afternoon, Captain. I have a job for you. We need to replace some water filters.
quest_canyon_9_1_ME_no: Sure, just tell me where to go.
quest_canyon_9_1_NPC_yes: You have probably noticed springs spouting from some of the canyon walls. We have installed special devices to analyze particles in the water. This will help us in studying the local waters. Your task is to replace the expired filters with new ones.
quest_canyon_9_1_completed: Wonderful. The process is simple - take out the old filter, insert a new one and then deliver the old one to the base. New filters will be waiting for you at the landing zone. Well, you can proceed.
quest_canyon_JP_1_0_greeting: Hi, Captain!  I heard a very interesting rumor today: some strange folks have settled near us. They like to party all night long! {Quest}Go check it out{/Quest} if you want.
quest_canyon_JP_1_1_greeting: Yo, punk! How did you find this place? Anyway, listen here - we put on REAL space races here. Got it, dude? There's a 2000 credit entry fee.
quest_canyon_JP_1_1_NPC_yes: That's my man! So, this is a time trial race.  Fly through all the checkpoints and if you will make it faster than the others, I'll pay you 6000 credits.  When you're ready to go just {Quest}land on the start line{/Quest}. Go now.
quest_canyon_JP_1_1_NPC_no: Don't be such a coward! Come back once you've grown a spine.
quest_canyon_JP_1_1_restart_greeting: Oh, you're back.  So, what'll it be?  Grab a beer and watch a real pilot fly?  Or do you actually have the nerve to participate?  The fee is 2000 credits.
quest_canyon_JP_1_1_restart_NPC_no: Don't be such a coward! Come back once you've grown a spine.
quest_canyon_JP_1_1_completed: Oh, you're here. I'll just hang on to those 2000 credits then.  You have 4 minutes to cross the finish line.  The race starts in 15 seconds.
quest_canyon_JP_1_2_completed: Come on, come on, come on!  Don't feel sorry for the engines, they can take it!
quest_canyon_JP_1_4_completed: I'm slowly beginning to believe in you...
quest_canyon_JP_1_6_completed: Just a little bit more, you're almost at the finish!
quest_canyon_JP_1_failed_crushed: BOOM!  Haha, I heard the explosion from here.  Easy money!
quest_canyon_JP_1_failed_timeout: Haha, too slow!  Maybe next time. Stop by again once you have 2000 more credits to burn, your money's always good here!
quest_canyon_JP_2_1_greeting: Yo! Want to make some money?  I set up a new route.  It's way more complicated than the previous one!  This time the fee is 4000 credits.
quest_canyon_JP_2_1_NPC_yes: Alright, you're in!  Do You remember the rules?  Only 4 minutes to cross the finish line, but the reward this time is 12000.  Once you are ready, {Quest}land on the start line{/Quest}. And here's some advice: upgrade your ship.
quest_canyon_JP_2_1_NPC_no: Your word. I recommend you upgrade your hardware if you haven't done it yet.
quest_canyon_JP_2_1_restart_greeting: Are you lost or did you come here for a reason? My offer is still good: 4000 credits to race.
quest_canyon_JP_2_1_restart_NPC_yes: I like this one! Do you have more money to lose? Then go to the start line.
quest_canyon_JP_2_1_restart_NPC_no: Right. You have to be mentally prepared, gather your strength, and really think about your life. Come back and join us if you want.
quest_canyon_JP_2_1_completed: I see you're on the start.  Make sure everything is in order, the race starts in 15 seconds.
quest_canyon_JP_2_2_completed: Crank it up, the engines can take it!
quest_canyon_JP_2_4_completed: You just might actually pull this off...
quest_canyon_JP_2_6_completed: You're so close, bring it home!
quest_canyon_JP_2_8_completed: Yeah, you have some racer potential my friend. Here it is your 12,000 credits.  Until next time!
quest_canyon_JP_2_failed_timeout: Not fast enough! But you were so close... If you want to try again, you know where to find me.
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_greeting: Hello again my friend! Are you ready for the most intense flight of your entire boring life? A couple of turns even made ME sweat! The entry fee has been increased to 6000 credits.
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_NPC_yes: All set? I doubt it, but OK. {Quest}Take the starting point{/Quest}. Do this right and you can take home 18000 credits! Don't forget to upgrade your crappy ship,
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_NPC_no: Right, take some time to think about it. Grab a beer and join us here.
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_restart_greeting: Talked yourself into it? Same conditions: I take 6000 credits now. If you win, this amount will be tripled and transferred to your account.
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_restart_ME_yes: I feel a need... the need for a high magnitude of velocity!
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_restart_NPC_yes: You have balls of steel, mah buddy. Get ready to start and lose in a minute: this route is the most complicated, just as I promised! Heh heh,
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_restart_NPC_no: Right, take some time to think about it. Grab a beer and join us here.
quest_canyon_JP_3_1_completed: Put on your diapers and get ready! Race starts in 15 seconds.
quest_canyon_JP_3_4_completed: How's it going? Still alive out there?
quest_canyon_JP_3_6_completed: You ROCK! And  you are so close. Come on!
quest_canyon_JP_3_8_completed: Yeah, you made it! You've definitlely got my respect. And my 18,000 credits... You're always welcome to come again. See ya around!
quest_canyon_JP_3_failed_timeout: Time's up. Don't worry, next time you'll make it. It's pro route, so get some practice and gear, and then come back again.
quest_canyon_8_3_greeting: What do we have here? Such an interesting device. Captain, please follow me to the hangar.
OxChassisWaterproof_Descr: This landing gear uses the unique AquaBlade technology developed by Atlantic Solutions. Increases water resistance of aircraft allowing it to submerge to a depth of up to 50 meters.
quest_canyon_9_4_completed: I see you are done with the first filter.  There are two more left. A new filter can be purchased on the trading platform.
quest_canyon_9_5_completed: Damn, I can see it with my own eyes - someone tampered with the filters to make them break! And I swear I know who did it. It can't go on like this. Here is your fee, Captain. I need to think what to do now.
quest_canyon_9_5_failed: Captain, why is this taking so long?? It's really urgent so I hired new team, you may go.
Scarab_VIP_Cabine_Descr: The test sample of the plated passenger compartment produced by 'Monte & Co'. Heavy-duty materials and Tortoise-H1 technology ensures the  safety of passengers in case of accidents or unexpected uncontrolled landings.
Marktext_Canyon_Racers_City_Flyto: Investigate the cause of the noise.
bases_spaceport_new_descr: Astlan-1 is the "cosmic gate" of the planet, built by the first settlers. All arriving and departing starships pass through this station, and it is from here that colonization of the planet began.
bases_colony_center_descr: Astlan-Central is a connecting colony and the main trading hub of the island.
bases_colony_nord_descr: A large terraforming station which gave the island of Astlan its current look.
bases_colony_nordwest_descr: Center of biological research and terraformation data analysis.
bases_dock_descr: Port Estel is the food hub for Astlan Island. It has an expansive fishing infrastructure designed for sustainable processing of edible marine life.
bases_bridge_descr: Raglor-Transit is the connecting pit stop between Astlan Island and Raglor; dozens of people go through this base daily. Here you can charge and repair your ship during the long flight across the ocean. Additionally, most freighters unload their cargo here.
bases_biggun_descr: The largest structure on the planet. A huge deposit of livermorium was discovered deep beneath the surface. The base itself is a giant laser drill.
bases_biggun_powerplant_descr: Supplies power to the Big Crater mining drill. The energy required is so huge that a separate base was constructed.
bases_livermoriummining_north_descr: Currently the largest colony on the planet and still continuing to evolve. The success and rapid growth of the colony is due to large deposits of livermorium that were discovered accidentally by a group of travelers. North 1 looks more like a city than a mining station. It has almost every amenity; from giant industrial enterprises to shopping centers and even artificial underground parks.
bases_livermoriummining_south_descr: The first large station on Raglor. From a small mining town specializing in the extraction of livermorium, it gradually grew to its current size. According to recent reports, the deposits of the livermorium are not as large as those at North-1, but it is significantly easier to extract the ore from the ground at Metallic-N.
bases_hardmaterialmining_descr: One of the first colonies on Raglor. It produces heavy metals; mainly iron, lead and molybdenum.
bases_quarry_southeast_descr: The colony and the surrounding area are the property of the M&T Corporation. The main product of extraction is praseodymium, which is also processed here and prepared for transportation to the mainland.
bases_geologicalstation_north_descr: A young colony with strange events somewhat dominating its short history. Previously, full-time corporate pilots were employed here, but recently Northern Gorge has been giving contracts to freelance frontier pilots in order to expand their operation. Northern Gorge production is based on rich deposits of aluminum, however recent geological reports hint at the presence of copper and nickel too.
bases_militarybase_descr: Center for planet-wide security services, this is the headquarters of the air police as well other planetary administration buildings. There is also a large military base. CONCORD falls under the jurisdiction of the United Government, however, several large corporations maintain security council offices here.
bases_researchlaboratory_east_descr: A large scientific complex containing many independent laboratories and a sophisticated meteorological center. Due to the type of research conducted here, the base is a platform located directly on the water. Rumor has it that illegal assembly shops and smugglers dens can also be found on the platform, if you know who to talk to.
bases_researchlaboratory_north_descr: Research platform specializing in the fields of biology, mycology and algology. Also home to the NileStar Corporation design bureau which is engaged in the development of modifications for aircraft and ships.
bases_cargoship_descr: An interstellar cargo vessel, these ships deliver personnel and materials from Earth. Extrasolar colonization is made possible thanks to their unique ability to travel the vast distances between stars.
bases_vessel_-6_0_descr: Advanced complex for the extraction, processing and packaging of local marine fauna. The main product is xenoscate. Property of Kapu Inc.
bases_vessel_-4_3_descr: Named for the north wind, this platform serves as a base for trawlers adapted to work in extremely cold conditions. The fishing fleet is currently engaged in the fishing of Polar Cracks - giant native fish that look similar to whales on Earth. The platform and the trawlers are owned by Kapu Inc.
bases_vessel_6_2_descr: Essentially, it's a giant vacuum cleaner for the ocean. It harvests, processes and packs local plankton - the most abundant food product on the planet.  Property of Kapu Inc.
bases_POI_descr: A true miracle of nature.  Many tourists are willing to pay a tidy sum to gaze at the alien beauty in comfort and safety.
bases_canyon_racer_descr: It would be difficult to call this place a true station or colony. It is really an island of entertainment standing out among the more sedate mining towns and research stations. Young people from all over Raglor, and even from other parts of the galaxy, come here to party in the carnival-like atmosphere. It has also been known to host unsanctioned races from time to time.
product_components_food_descr: Enhanced rations for a balanced diet. Recommended for those working in professions involving serious physical exertion.
product_components_battery_descr: Intended for repair and construction drones. Medium capacity.
product_empty_battery_descr: Intended for repair and construction drones. Recharge required
product_components_battery_livermory_des: New invention. Designed for heavy mining.
product_components_water_descr: Purified and hermetically packaged drinking water.
product_bio_micro_materials_descr: Found in the wild part of a local plant. Without proper storage conditions, it quickly becomes unusable.
product_seafood_descr: SeaSide-1 is rich in protein made from the local marine fauna found on Raglor.
product_survivalcapsule_descr: The last word in safety for flights into harsh alien conditions. The shell is made of very durable materials.  Passengers can ride in comfort and style, with the peace of mind to not worry about any unfortunate mishaps.
product_livermorium_small_descr: Packaged in shielded containers for safe transport, livermorium is Raglor's most valuable commodity and has prompted a veritable 'gold rush' on the planet.
product_raw_water1_descr: Deuterium oxide is used in nuclear reactors and other devices.
product_raw_water2_descr: Deuterium oxide that has undergone two-stage treatment. Used in nuclear reactors and other devices.
product_expl_water1_descr: Also known as super-heavy water. Used as a radioactive indicator of moisture impermeability.
product_raw_metal1_descr: Standard II, peeled. Widely used in a variety of production and processing industries.
product_raw_metal2_descr: Used in the creation of refractory materials and superconductors, as well as in aluminum doping.  Comes in the form of metalized coils.
product_raw_ore1_descr: Supplied in metal reinforced containers. Passed the primary cleaning.
product_raw_ore2_descr: Formed for convenience and reliability of storage. Widely used in the manufacture of magnets.
product_raw_ore3_descr: Securely packaged in airtight containers. However, avoid large overloads.
product_egg_descr: Encapsulated sample of local flora. This is of great value to biologists and researchers.
product_raw_rock_ore1_descr: Solid piece of rock, rich in praseodymium.
product_raw_rock_ore2_descr: Heavy rock fragment rich in terbium.  It has strong magnetic properties that should be considered during transportation.
product_bio_materials_descr: Unidentified, has no resemblance to any recorded species. Biologists would love to study it.
product_raw_composite1_descr: Carbon plates used in construction. Can be found in almost every building on the planet.
product_raw_composite2_descr: Made with a core of metal-plastic.  Comprise the "bones" of the vast majority of buildings on the planet.
product_components_optic_descr: High precision, used in professional telescopes.
product_components_protein_descr: The standard ration for long intergalactic flights. High dysprosium content.
product_components_canned_fish_descr: Cans of preserved 'sea cockerel', 500g each. Made on Raglor by Kapu Inc.
product_components_maintenance_kit_descr: Used for the repair of construction and industrial droids. Fragile cargo.
product_tools_scientific_descr: Equipment designed to detect and analyse various life forms. The primary tool of Raglorian biologists.
product_tools_car2_descr: Microdrones for internal work. Made by TAURUS. Keep right-side up!
product_mining_zond_descr: Uses G-wave technology. Designed to conduct geological surface studies.
product_aqua_zond_descr: Uses G-wave technology. Used on research and fishing vessels to locate marine fauna.
product_tools_box2_descr: Shielded boxes for the transportation of mining products. Made on Vulcanis by M&T Corp.
product_tools_filtr_module_descr: A universal element of the Dvoretsky+ economy class home systems.
product_agent_ship_descr: The cause of the crash could not be determined. Catastrophic damage.
product_radar_quest_descr: Everything needed to build a field radar station.
product_Fungus_Mycelium_descr: A found piece of mycelium: unknown properties and origin. Keep clear!
product_Fungus_Sporeorgan_descr: Improvised weapon of mass destruction. Estimated range of 5km.
product_Fungus_Equipment_descr: Equipment for research and work with bio-samples. Property of Kapu Inc.
product_Smugglers_Alcobox_descr: Elite alcohol from Earth. Consignment and shipping documents are missing.
product_Smugglers_Stealth_Device_descr: Homemade analogue of the military cloaking field. Reliability and field duration are not guaranteed.
product_Smugglers_Toxic_Mineral_descr: Unknown mineral, highly toxic. WARNING: Handling without a protective suit is not recommended.
product_Smugglers_Toxic_Bomb_descr: Improvised weapons of mass destruction. Estimated range of 5km.
product_Smugglers_Weapons_descr: Professional weapons and equipment used by special forces. Contains explosives.
product_Quest_Main_Ending_Emitter_descr: Strong radiation may damage onboard systems. Analysis could not determine the primary function or origin of the device.
product_Quest_Main_Ending_Armored_Cargo_: An insulating container which suppresses negative effects of radiation.
product_Canyon_Start_Box_descr: Universal set of equipment designed for a wide range of geological studies. Made by 'Monte & Co'.
product_Canyon_Soil_Analyzer_descr: Portable module for sampling and field analysis of soil. Produced on Amazon-17 by Kapu Inc.
product_Canyon_Cartographer_Device_descr: A set of cameras and movable lenses allows you to dynamically create a digital copy of rugged terrain. Civilian version.
product_Canyon_Ore_Analyzer_descr: Operationg on the principles of GW-radiation, this analyzer determines the physical properties of a material.
product_Canyon_Bio_Analyzer_descr: Multifunctional device used by biologists to conduct offline research. Equipped with twelve mini-drones and a dock.
product_Canyon_Water_Chassis_descr: Disassembled waterproof landing gear packed in a fortified container.
product_Canyon_Fisher_1_descr: An advanced self-contained device for catching plankton and small crabs, known as the "vacuum cleaner". Made by NileStar.
product_Canyon_Fisher_2_descr: An advanced self-contained device for catching plankton and small crabs, known as the "vacuum cleaner". Made by NileStar.
product_Canyon_Water_Filter_New_descr: Universal water filter of the latest design. Equipped with an expanded tank for waste material.
product_Canyon_Water_Filter_Old_descr: Universal water filter equipped with an expanded waste tank. Damaged.
product_Canyon_Hefesto_Scanner_descr: Powerful scanner designed to analyze the upper layers of rock. Produced by M & T Corp. on Vulcanis.
product_Canyon_Crystal_Ore_descr: A piece of rare-earth metal mined at the Canyon. Securely packaged in a shielded container.
Ship_AI_Crash_Message: ATTENTION! A level of overload incompatible with human functionality has been detected. Emergency ejection protocol initiated. The autopilot will take your rescue capsule to the nearest rescue center.

Canyon_Epilog_2_NPC_yes_2: Of course, at first they started yelling. Then they were breaking and throwing things at us. But we had the numbers. This fierce competition which has grown into hostility is becoming quite a problem for both sides. After all, they are businessmen, who prefer profit to vendettas and principles.
product_Canyon_Metal_Construct_descr: Made of a composite material by using nano-cleaning. Used to create the frames of large buildings.

product_archeology_endproduct_descr: Primary processed and classified samples of local fossilized flora and fauna, Arranged according to the 3rd transportation class.
product_waste_descr: D3 class waste, sublimated and molded for further processing, disposal or preservation.
bases_archeology_researchlaboratory_S_de: Archaeology camp set up by the Lee Chen University, a leader in xenobiology and genetic engineering.
ScarabLocatorBase_Descr:
"The base model of the Orb S locator from Si-tech.
Warning: Avoid Exposure Above 125 SKI "
ScarabLocatorWaterProof_Descr: Atlantics Solutions Orb W Locator with advanced protection against liquids and dust according to IP68-X standards. It also has improved echolocation functions in aquatic environments.
ScarabLocatorCargoRange_Descr: "Vzor 14" locator model from Korolev Corporation with increased accuracy allows you to detect small and medium-sized objects at a longer distance. Attention: the device is sensitive to radiation.
ScarabLocatorCargoRange2_Descr: "Vzor 18" locator the latest model from Korolev Corporation of the highest accuracy, allows you to detect small and medium-sized objects at a greater distance. Attention: the device is sensitive to external aggressive radiation.
ScarabWingsLight_Descr: PaulGears lightweight wings are the best VTOL flight solutions currently available. Due to the latest materials, the engineers managed to reduce the mass and increase the strength of the wing.
ScarabWingsShuttle_Descr: The latest military development from PaulGears. Variable geometry wings, compact, with high lift.
ScarabEnginesPower2_Descr: GTX-2 Sports Engines from S.T.A.R. - the world-famous headliner in the field of tuning parts, custom ships, as well as sports equipment for pilots.
ScarabEnginesEconomy_Descr: Through the use of expensive beryllium high-frequency refractors, Greenlight Electronics has developed a new generation of engines for Scarab. The advantages are obvious - an increase in power, weight reduction, a multiple reduction in energy consumption!
ScarabCargoWeight1_Descr: Tuning from S.T.A.R., gravitational fasteners and bulkheads made of nano-threads, which implies almost double the effectiveness of the hold space.
ScarabCargoCount_Descr: The Segment hold allows you to load a higher quantity of low-mass cargo
ScarabFuelTankAdditional1_Descr: A new solution from Greenlight Electronics. These contain two-phase converters to actively mould the shape of the suspension unit. Technicians often call them "Salami"
ScarabFuelTankAdditional2_Descr: Overhead batteries "Stranik" The largest capacity of any battery in the Atlantics Solutions range for small aircraft. Their external fitting will mean an increase in drag.
ScarabFuelTankAdditional3_Descr: Gigantic batteries from Emilian Corporation. The ultimate choice for ultra-long range flights and powerful engines.

product_Actinobacteria_descr: Cryocontainers containing microorganisms with an ultra-high livermorium concentration - 'Actinobacteria Livermorium gen 5XX'
product_mining_drill_descr: The main working part of the XCMG3236 roadheader. Despite its massive appearance, it's a rather fragile part.
SkinDescriptionScarabSkin1: Additional livre for the ship's fuselage
Power_Stats_Description: Information about the power-to-weight ratio and engines of the ship

bases_astlan_north_descr: The northernmost and most powerful terraforming base in the region. The seasonal winds that cross Stronsay Island are great for spraying bacteria across an entire sector of the planet.
bases_astlan_north_tank_descr: The largest cultivation farm in Astlan. Using the latest method of culturing microorganisms, used for cultural diagnostics in medical microbiology, hundreds of tons of genetically modified microorganisms are produced here for their further integration into the biosphere of the planet.
bases_astlan_southwest_termit_descr: The research camp next to "as locals called it - termite mound", resembling terrestrial "houses" of ants.
quest_fungus_1_2_greeting: You picked up the cargo? Now please, deliver it to the Bora lab ASAP. You have tem minutes, it's the matter of urgency.
Passenger_ComingHome_Message: I want to go back to {NPC_Behav_DestinationMapName}. Will you take me there?
