quest_smugglers_3_1_Cable_greeting: There is a job for you: take the cargo at {Quest}Drill Site N{/Quest} and deliver it {Quest}here{/Quest}.
quest_smugglers_8_1_Cable_greeting: I haven't seen you for a long time, Cap. There is a deal to pick up people from {Quest}Drill Site N{/Quest} and bring them here.
quest_smugglers_8_1_Cable_NPC_yes:
Seems like Hydam's idea failed... It's my turn now. We do this the hard way - an armed assault. My boys are arriving at {Quest}Drill Site N{/Quest}, straight off a flight from Earth.  
Your task is to meet them and {Quest}bring them here{/Quest}. Hurry up.
Passenger_Smuggler_Mercenary_2_TakeMe: {Say}I had already begun to lose hope. Are you from Cable? Some shit happened, I barely managed to eject the rescue capsule, and then lost consciousness... And then I woke up here! {/Say}
quest_canyon_4_1_NPC_yes: With pleasure! Another large company, Kapu Inc., is interested in the Canyon. They were attracted by our unusual flora and fauna. Some of their scientists are very famous, and the corporation requires a VIP compartment on the ship.
quest_canyon_4_2_completed: You got the upgrade? Good. Even if you crash, passengers in such a compartment will at most receive scratches and a minor headache. The ladies are waiting for you on the {Quest}Dril{/Quest}l. And do not even try to hit on Julia! Trust me on this one; I know from experience!
quest_astlan_main_buy_wings_6_open: {Say}As our regular customer, we would like to offer you a new ship: Ox - Fourth modification with variable wing geometry and improved 'FreeFlight'. Available to purchase right now in the {Quest}Raglor-Transit{/Quest} hangar!{/Say}
quest_astlan_main_prolog02:
{Say}{Green}This is the Flight Control Center speaking.{/Green} Welcome to Astlan!

We are pleased to announce that your first customer is awaiting your arrival at the Astlan-1.{Quest}Flight data was {/Quest} transferred on board.{/Say}
quest_canyon_JP_1_8_completed: Yeah, you made it! So you really do have some skills! Here you go: 6000 credits. Swing by later and i will prepare another route. Oh, and one little gift.. We looted some cool stuff from a draw ship, and our guy will set it up on ur ship almost for free at Canyon-City
quest_smugglers_8_1_Cable_completed: Cap, bad news. The ship with our guys has crashed. Cause of the accident is still unknown. The survivors were scattered over dozens of kilometers. The {Quest}search zone{/Quest} is loading into your nav system. Seems like there are only {Quest}three{/Quest} left. Dont return untill we know they are safe or deceased.
quest_canyon_8_1_NPC_yes: In a sense...  In fact, we want to catch plankton rather than fish. It is a great source of protein. Intel says it's a great source of protein, But 'NileStar' lab faces some problems, so go there and find out what happens.
quest_geo_north_city_phase_2_complete: {Say}Captain, geological exploration is complete. The North Mine requires building material. If your ship doesn't have enough capacity, we kept one Ox-v4 hold fixture for you on {Quest}Hardmine base{/Quest}.{/Say}
quest_geo_north_city_phase_3_complete: {Say}Captain, thank you for supplying the North Mine. We have some special Оx-v4 upgrades for you on Hardmine. Have a look in the hangar.{/Say}
quest_smugglers_4_1_Cable_quest_complete: Nice to see you again. {Quest}Cargo{/Quest} is in stock, you know what to do next. You stopped at {Quest}Orient-RESEARCH{/Quest}? I suggest you not to stay at one place for too long, but it's up to you.
quest_astlan_main_heavycargo_4.1_complet: {Say}Container loading complete. Ah, I completely forgot. It's a hell of a HEAVY cargo, so be careful. Now deliver it to {Quest}Astlan-1{/Quest}
quest_canyon_2_1_greeting: Hi, this is Romulo. Our expedition is gaining momentum, or at least it will if you decide to help us out! I have a job for you. If you want to make some money Call me
quest_canyon_3_1_greeting: Hey, Captain. I have a job for you, come to Canyon Central. Call me
MeteoCenterSetNormalRadiaton: SKI background stable. Dangerous radiation levels will be encountered above {Green}3 kilometers{/Green}.
MeteoCenterSetSemiLowRadiaton: SKI background increasing. Dangerous radiation levels will be encountered {Orange}above 2 kilometers{/Orange}. Use caution when choosing a flight altitude.
MeteoCenterSetLowRadiaton: Warning! {Red}High{/Red} level of SKI. Dangerous radiation levels will be encountered abowe 1 kilometer. Use caution when choosing a flight altitude.
MeteoCenterSetHighRadiaton: SKI background stable. Dangerous radiation levels will be encountered above 4 kilometers.
MeteoCenter_Message_BadWeather: Strong gusts of wind! Land or lower altitude to minimum.
MeteoCenter_Normal_Rad_Warning: Attention. Predicted SKI level {Green}normal{/Green}. Favorable for flying in high atmospheric layers.
MeteoCenter_Semilow_Rad_Warning: Attention! SKI level will be reduced soon. Recommended flight altitude not more {Orange}than 1.5 kilometers.{/Orange}
quest_SetCalmWeatherr_Raglor_Set4Scaner: Flight conditions are favorable. Happy travel!
quest_raglor_main_4.1_open: {Say}Captain, unfortunately the meeting was canceled. Please take me to {Quest}Big Crater{/Quest} since you have free time. I was curious to have a look at it, but I was too busy.{/Say}
product_scaner_quest1_descr: Third generation Wave geolocation scanner.  Has low weight and is easy to maintain.
product_scaner_quest2_descr: Drilling equipment service kit. Widely used at small mining stations.
product_scaner_quest3_descr: A radio complex capable of providing stable communication with the far stations of the star system.
product_scaner_quest4_descr: Army HomeLandOil spilled in fuel-tight tanks. Used for ground trucks and underground trains.
product_scaner_quest5_descr: 'LQK-400eq' is the codename for the experimental deep gas production system. This container contains accessories for servicing
quest_raglor_radars_1_1_complete: {Say}Starting small. Your first cargo is really light and tough. The client - Monte&Co. Delivery coords are on your map{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_2_open: {Say}Great! Pick up the second scanner at drill site {Quest}North-1{/Quest}. Btw, it's the biggest and richest of Raglor colonies, thanks to livermorium.When you are there, be sure to take a look at the giant geyser {/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_2_complete: {Say} Aha, equipment for M&T Corp mining field camp. Very good, now deliver it to {Quest}destination poing{/Quest}{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_3_open: {Say}Let's continue. Hmm, very unusual cargo.. Powerfull portable radiostation. Find and load it at {Quest}Metallic-N{/Quest}.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_3_complete: {Say}According to beacon data, the goods is in your hold, captain. Good, now deliver it at {Quest}marked location{/Quest}{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_4_open: {Say}You nearly finished. The penult cargo awaits you at {Quest}CONCORD base{/Quest}. {/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_4_complete: {Say}What do we have here.. Gazoline barrels. Be careful, pilot, and have a safe flight to the {Quest}point{/Quest}.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_5_open: {Say}Finally, the last one. My favorite customer - {Quest}Orient-RESEARCH{/Quest} scinetists. It's where you will find your last cargo. Besides, you would better make some preparations before delivery{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_5_complete: {Say}Got a message that box it inside your ship. Good, you managed to load it - now deliver it to the {Quest}point{/Quest}. And don't screw up{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_1.2_complete: {Say} The client has confirmed receiving of the shipment. Apparently, geo-prospecting has found the next deposits of rare-earth elements, and they will be digging. For information - 95% of the electronics and equipment of your ship are made from materials mined by Monte & Co. {/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_2.2_complete: {Say} Is the cargo in place? Wonderful. By the way, if your ship has enough cargo capacity, you will be gladly received at the {Quest} base of the M&T Corp {/Quest}, which is in the southeast of the mainland. They produce a lot, but they do not have time to sell. {/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_3.2_complete: {Say} Shipment delivery confirmed. Well, H&K has a dubious reputation and exaggerated requirements for contractors, but they pay very well. {/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_4.2_complete: {Say} The Quartermaster has just confirmed delivery of the shipment. Well done, pilot! If you are going to continue to trade, there is one simple law - the price of transportation is based on three factors: the weight of the goods, its fragility, and the distance of delivery {/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_5.2_complete: {Say} Confirmed. Well, captain, that's all. Great job! {/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_6_open_end: {Say}Im going to the {Quest}Big Crater Site{/Quest} soon. When you feel ready for next contract - visit me there. BC is the new base at the center of Raglor, you wont miss it. Ok now, good luck and safe travels!{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_1_open: {Say}Hi, geologists have a job for you. Cargo delivering to different spots. Work is simple and payment is good. Contact me if interested {btnX}[IVT_Ship_ToggleMapStory] {/btnX}{/Say}
Canyon_Quest_10_CEO_Failed: Why the hell it is shaking ?! Someone call the rescuers!
Canyon_Quest_10_CEO_Failed_NPC: Emergency squad is on the way. How did you manage to crash? Dammit... Our task is getiing much harder. I wiil notify you if I get any news.
quest_astlan_main_buy_advice: {Say} By the way, you may trade on you own without special orders. Every base constantly produces and buys a number of goods. And quartermasters regularly replenish lists of available and needed goods, which you can check in your ship's map interface. {btnX}<M>{/btnX}{/Say}
_PassengersRightCityMessage_: Looks like it's the right place. May I go out?
TakeMeMessage_Quest_variant: Captain, are you ready to let me in?
_PassengersRightCityMessage_1: Oh, it's the place what i need! I appreciate it, captian! Could you please let me out?
_PassengersRightCityMessage_2: Allready there? It was a quick flight! Well.. I may go out, I suppose?
_PassengersRightCityMessage_3: And there is my stop. Thank you for a flight, captain. May I go out?
_PassengerPleaseLandMessage_: Could you please land over there?
HUD_Passenger_Hardmaterialmining_ReadyMe: I'm inside, captian. It's very time to go to CargoSpaceWay
Passenger_Hardmaterialmining_ReadyMessag: I'm inside, captian. It's very time to go to CargoSpaceWay.
Passenger_Canyon_Julia_TakeMePlease: Captain, We need to be in Canyon-city soon, so we'd better get going.
PassengerTakeMeMessage_2: Well, hello, captain! {NPC_DestinationMapName}. I'll pay upon arrival.
PassengerTakeMePleaseMessage_2: Are we going or not? {NPC_DestinationMapName}. I won’t wait for you forever
PassengersWrongCityMessage_2: Where we are?! Is it b>{NPC_DestinationMapName}?
PassengersReadyMessage_2: I am inside. Let's go to {NPC_DestinationMapName}!
PassengersCompleteMessage_2: I was not a great flight but you earned {NPC_Mem_RewardForPassanger}.
PassengerTakeMeMessage_3: Hey, Cap. I need to reach {NPC_DestinationMapName}, as soon as possible.
PassengerTakeMePleaseMessage_3: Tik-Tok. I am out of time.
PassengerOpenCargoInMessage_3: Open up. Fast. I am late.
PassengersOpenCargoOutMessage_3: Finally we are here. Open it.
PassengersReadyMessage_3: I am inside. Let's go to {NPC_DestinationMapName}!
PassengersCompleteMessage_3: Thanks. I send you {NPC_Mem_RewardForPassanger} credits. See you soon.
PassengerTakeMeMessage_4: Hey, how are you? I have to be in {NPC_DestinationMapName} as soon as possible. Would you pick me up?
PassengerTakeMePleaseMessage_4: Would you pick me up? With me time flies so fast. Take me to {NPC_DestinationMapName}
PassengersWrongCityMessage_4: Hm, seems like it's not where i have to be. Do you have some business here? I am ok with it but i have to be in {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Should i go out?
PassengerOpenCargoInMessage_4: Knock-Knock. You  forgot to open the passenger gateway.
PassengersOpenCargoOutMessage_4: Oh, we are here. Open the passenger gateway.
PassengersReadyMessage_4: Hm, nice ship. Let's go to {NPC_DestinationMapName}. What's your name?
PassengersCompleteMessage_4: Great. Thank you for the ride. Here it is some credits for you. {NPC_Mem_RewardForPassanger}
PassengerTakeMeMessage_6: Hey, Would you give me a ride to {NPC_DestinationMapName}?
PassengerTakeMePleaseMessage_6: Hey, i am still here. Wouldd you give me a ridde to {NPC_DestinationMapName}?
PassengersWrongCityMessage_6: Where we are? It is not the {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Should i go out?
PassengerTakeMeMessage_7: Hey, how are you? I have to be in {NPC_DestinationMapName} as soon as possible. Would you pick me up?
PassengerTakeMePleaseMessage_7: I don't wonna go, but i would be fired. I just have to be at {NPC_DestinationMapName} in time.
PassengersWrongCityMessage_7: Nice place, but i have to be {NPC_DestinationMapName}. Should i go out?
PassengerOpenCargoInMessage_7: Pretty high-quality design. Probably withstands enormous loads. It's me outside admiring your hatch.
PassengersOpenCargoOutMessage_7: I wanted to ask you to let me go, but then I remembered that bunch of things that awaits me outside .. Okay, better not to think about it. Release me, captain.
PassengersReadyMessage_7: I have to be in {NPC_DestinationMapName}, but I do not mind taking a ride, look around.
PassengersCompleteMessage_7: How much shoul i pay? {NPC_Mem_RewardForPassanger}? See you later!
Passengers_RM_2: Damn, how long are we already flying ... Man, when will we be there?
Passengers_RM_3: Captain, have you ever been to {NPC_DestinationMapName}? I heared there are a lot of great bars. Do you wonna visit one of them?
Passengers_RM_4: Still, the cool thing is an air taxi. But there were times when people were in traffic jams and could only dream of such a thing.
Passengers_RM_7: Captain, there is no signal. Can not even listen the music!
Passengers_RM_8: Really thirsty, do you have someting to drink? Oh, i see the fridge.
Passengers_RM_9: I'm also thinking about buying my own ship. But with my family and my second job, I don’t have enough time to get a license ...
Passengers_RM_11: Do you know a Tony Kild? He took me to a neighboring base, so he flow all over Astana, and refused to land!
Passengers_RM_12: Recently, the weather is sucks. Even several Astlan-Raglor flights were canceled
Passengers_RM_14: Do you know what Raglor is missing? Normal, solid, and most importantly - legal - places where you can have fun.
Passengers_RM_15: What can you say about local food? As for me, the ocean fish is bitter, and i am completely sick of the protein paste!
Passengers_RM_16: Captain, an interesting scientific fact: the longer the flight, the lower the mass of the ship. This is due to the specifics of the ship charging batteries. Experienced pilots take this into account when flying.
Passengers_RM_17: Have you gained height? If so, it’s better not to. The radiation on this planet is harsh.
Passengers_RM_18: It’s nice to know that a loving family and children are waiting at home. And in the morning at work a pleasant team and loyal bosses are waiting. Are you jealous?
Passengers_RM_19: Hah, fun ... Cap, I just read a joke: Knock-Knock who is it? Your engine is in the fire.
Passengers_RM_21: On a party yesterday, my drunk friend decided to weigh himself. In general, I don’t have a robot cleaner anymore ...
Passengers_RM_22: Raglor such a shit whole. Have you ever been to other planets?
Passengers_RM_23: What is this strange spot on the horizon? Is it approaching us? After all these rumors about aliens, you begin to fear your own shadow.
Passengers_RM_24: And why I agreed to this business trip .. Could be home now. vast ocean, warmth, birds sing, dolphins ...  ... beauty!
Passengers_RM_25:
"Emilian stocks are steadily going up. There are a lot of rumors around this corporation.
 supposedly, they found ancient technologies on some planet in deep space. By the way, did you know? Ballena is their product."
Passengers_RM_26: Have you seen this giant thing in the center of Raglore? they will drill very deep, and because they found a deposits of livermonium. But it's not a drill!
Passengers_RM_27: Once I happened to be at Raglor Canyon, in the north of the mainland. A very promising place. And this is not only my forecast.
Passengers_RM_28: I must admit, I am very nervous during such trips. According to the media, recently several pilots missed. And no body can find them.
Passengers_RM_29: Raglor - tens and tens of kilometers of monotonous orange wasteland. I never thought that I would miss the xenotropics of Vulcanis.
Passengers_RM_31: Of course, I understand that Raglor is an industrial hole like Anvilside. But people still live here - where are the shopping centers? Where are the clubs? Where are the supermarkets, after all ?!
Passengers_RM_32: Have you ever wondered if there were anyone here before us? It turns out that not only I am interested in it. I once saw an archaeological site somewhere deep in the mainland. And it seems they have found something!
Passengers_RM_33: Captain, can you imagine? Suaqo Ltd has announced a liverermonium-tasting soda ...
Passengers_RM_34: Have you been to M&T? Their drilling equipment is just something great!
Passengers_RM_35: Do you know what the Big Crater is? Today in the magazine I read this version - supposedly, the ancient civilization that lived here before us tried to break through to the core of the planet. God ... these guys should have learned the math..
Passengers_RM_36: Big Crater ... The official version is a giant drill. But after working for 12 years in the galactic fleet, I can tell you with confidence - this is a huge tool. What to shoot from such a huge gun?
Passengers_RM_37: Have you seen this construction site in the middle of Raglore? So, this is not a drill. This Sky-Telecom is building a giant antenna to pour dirt across the galaxy to the people!
Passengers_RM_38:
"The other day I saw a guy on Hardmine. There is something ... inhuman in him. Movements, facial expressions .. hard to say. Or maybe the guy just had a hangover?
"
Passengers_RM_39: I saw how frontiers like you helped in the deployment of some objects, right in the middle of the desert. I wonder what is it for..
Passengers_RM_41: I saw how geologists are deploying field geological exploration. Who would be here if not a livermonium.
Passengers_RM_42: A friend from the Security Service told me that an inspector had been sent to us from the metropolis. Seems like we gonna have problems.
Passengers_RM_43: Have you seen these weird floating things on the beach? I was terribly afraid when i saw it. It turns out that they are absolutely harmless, and even useful - they purify water from all sorts of nasty things.
Passengers_RM_44: You must have seen unusual turquoise mushrooms on the shore. My brother Tybalt told me an amazing thing: these are intelligent mushrooms, can you imagine ?!
Passengers_RM_45: Have you ever been to Vulkanis? Amazing place. Dangerous rainforests full of gigantic aggressive creatures. Probably, the Earth looked like this some time ago.
quest_raglor_radars_1_1_open_NPC_yes: {Say}The work is very simple - to help corporations deliver the necessary goods to -  'in the field'. 5000 cr for every cargo. You will find the first {Quest}container{/Quest} on the cargo area. This is the one with the orange color.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_1_open_NPC_no: {Say}Great. You will find the first container on the cargo area. This is the one with the orange color.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_3_open_NPC_yes: {Say}Powerful portable radio station. Why they need such a fixed field-based device - I have no idea. This load is extremely fragile. Take off and land gently, avoid storms - and everything will be fine.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_3_open_ME_yes: What is wrong with the cargo?
quest_raglor_radars_1_3.2_open_NPC_yes: {Say}A lot of people blame H&K for stealing intellectual property and connections with the underworld. By the way, you know OX-v4? The most popular ship among frontiers - their technology.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_3.2_open_ME_no: I'm not used to giving up an easy money
quest_raglor_radars_1_4_open_NPC_yes: {Say}. Because it is. This is the metropolitan security service: they maintain order and law on the planet, sell mining licenses. Engaged in cadastre, taxes, etc.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_4_open_NPC_no: {Say}Not a talkable type, are you? The location of their base is already in your on-board computer{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_5.2_open_NPC_yes: {Say} Exactly, Researchers pump some kind of gas from the bowels, and they need to update production equipment. And these things are damn heavy. I recommend buy powerful engines, as well as expand the cargo compartment.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_5.2_open_ME_no: Yes, yes, I'm on the way
quest_raglor_radars_1_3.2_complete_NPC_y: {Say}A lot of people blame H&K for stealing intellectual property and connections with the underworld. By the way, your OXv4 is the most popular ship among frontiers - their technology.{/Say}
quest_raglor_radars_1_3.2_complete_ME_no: I'm not used to giving up an easy money
MeteoCenter_Message_SandstormWeather_war: Warning! A sandstorm is approaching. It is highly recommended to stay at high atmosphere levels
MeteoCenter_Message_SandstormWeather: Sandstorm! Strongly reccomended to stay at high atmosphere levels!
quest_archeology_invite: Captain, archaeologists need help. Job is simple, the cargoes are not heavy - the ancient remains saturated with livermonium. You can find the archaeologist base {Quest}on the north of Metallic-N base.{/Quest}
quest_archeology_complete1: New employee? I’ll go straight to the point. We dig out ancient specimens, make a quick analysis, and then you guys {Quest}deliver it to the laboratory{/Quest}. Look around, the livermonium radiation will help you find the cargo.
quest_archeology_complete2: Hello. Thanks for the help. I send you {Quest}coordinates of other expeditions{/Quest}, and i'll make a call to my friend on Metallic-N. He will provide you with specialized upgrades for Scarab, which will simplify the delivery of goods.
product_archeology1_descr: Excavated piece of rock, containing unidentified remains of an ancient organism
product_archeology2_descr: Skeleton samples of an ancient giant creature, Very well preserved.
product_archeology3_descr: The primary analysis could not determine whether this sample belongs to any species.
quest_raglor_main_3.1_complete2: We are in place. Captain, give me a couple of minutes
bases_skeleton_discovery_A_descr: It was the scientists from this expedition who discovered the remains, and proved the existence of a highly developed life on the planet. However, the camp has funding problems
bases_skeleton_discovery_B_descr: Mobile Research Base 'Kapu Inc'. Unlike other archaeological expeditions, pursuing the historical and scientific value of the finds, this interests the saturation of livermonium in artifacts.
bases_skeleton_discovery_C_descr: WAAC - World Association of Alien Creationism. large organization, a syndicate of many laboratories developing a theory, that life on Earth was born artificially, by aliens. This camp is their field laboratory.
MeteoCenter_High_Rad_Warning: Pilots, good news. Predicted SKI level is {btnX}very low{/btnX} Max. flight altitude - above 3km.
quest_raglor_radars_1_1_confirm: Greetings. Is it about the job?
Quest_Plum_Contacts_Tutorial: Hello captain! I have a job for you. When you are ready - contact me. You can do this using the interface of your ship - {btnX} [IVT_Ship_ToggleMapStory] {/btnX}
quest_raglor_main_1_confirm: Hi, Are you calling related the job?
MeteoCenter_Message_StormWeather_warning: Warning! Storm is comming! Hide somewhere!
Quest_Cable_Contacts_Tutorial: * System message *: You have one missed call from the Cable contact. Press {btnX}[IVT_Ship_ToggleMapStory]{/btnX} and select it from the list.
quest_canyon_8_Romulo_invite: Hi, captain! This is Julia, I have a job for you. If interested, come to Canyon Central.
Security_Captain_descr: Colony Security Officer. He is responsible for the rule of law on Raglore, as well as for countering external threats.
Rain_Weather_Prediction: FORECAST: In a few minutes Under the influence of the cyclone and its frontal sections, heavy rain will take place, in some areas a strong wind
Events_Engine_Pending: I'm starting an analysis of engine damages ...
quest_astlan_inspector_hint_1: The matter is really urgent. If we get there in time - you get extra money.
quest_astlan_inspector_hint_2: It seems we are late, and the clerk just left the town. Well, it can't be helped. And obviously, no premium payment for you.
quest_smugglers_4_2_1_Cable_greeting: Got the device? Then move your bones here to the {Quest}Orient-RESEARCH{/Quest}, now! Looks like we gonna have company soon.
QuestRaglor_Main_Reputation_Hint_message: Well done, captain! Exactly what we need. Please continue to supply us with the necessary materials. Upon reaching the next stage, a more interesting job will appear.
quest_geo_north_city_phase_4_complete: Your help is invaluable, captain! The base, as they say, 'blooms and smells'. Now it is a full-fledged colony along with other Raglor cities. And by the way, the range of upgrades was updated again.
quest_canyon_9_2_completed: Very good. Now, since you ejected an old filter, you need to inject the new one. You may do it right now or after trasporting the spoiled filter to our base. It's quite tight there on these platforms after all
QuestRaglor_5_6_2_failed: Captain, can you hear me? We lost cargo beacon signal. Box is deadly damaged, lost or other pilot took it. Anyway, task is canceled.
quest_raglor_radars_failed: Captain, i been reprimanded for radar components transportship delays. It seems the matter is really urgent. Sorry, but they hired another pilot. If you are still willing to help us - please support us with needed goods.
Trader_Assistant_descr: Former frontier-pilot, colleague, retired due to injury. May help with advice.
Passenger_Matt_CONCORD: Hey, whatta hell?! Where did you bring me? And what are you plotting?
product_stat_3_descr: Brand new hull that protects the generator from external damage. It seems that someone confused the declaration - the cargo formally does not belong to anyone and is waiting for its lucky owner
Passengers_RM_13: Captain, have you ever wondered why it is always day on this planet? This is not the first day this question haunts me.
Statistic_Passanger_Matt_descr: Such a strange guy. Seems like Raglor is not for him, that why he wonna leave this place
Passenger_Statistic_Matt_TakeMe: Hey, what’s up? I have to leave this planet. Would you help me? I screwed up big time.
Passenger_Statistic_Matt_TakeMePlease: I am still here. I have to be on CargoSpaceWay. Would you help me?
Reply_Matt_no: No offense. I do not need problems
Statistic_Passanger_Cop_Talk_thanks: Nice, we were looking for him for a long time. Thank you for your help. Here is your reward.
Passenger_Statistic_Matt_CompleteMessage: Here we come. Thank you. You know i cant pay you right now all of my accounts blocked. Take care.
product_stat_1_descr: Software universal chips, applicable for most devices. It seems that someone messed up with the declarations - the cargo formally does not belong to anyone and is waiting for its happy owner
product_stat_2_descr: Professional lenses for powerful telescopes. It seems that someone messed up with the declarations - the cargo formally does not belong to anyone and is waiting for its happy owner
MeteoCenter_Message_RainWeather_5min_war: Attention, a cyclone is coming. In about five minutes, there will be a heavy downpour accompanied by a gusty wind.
MeteoCenter_Message_RainWeather_3min_war:
We repeat, a thunderstorm is coming. Long haul flights can be dangerous.
We recommend that you land or fly at the lowest possible altitude.
MeteoCenter_Message_RainWeather_1min_war: Cyclone! Life threatening! It is highly recommended to lower the height as soon as possible.
MeteoCenter_Message_SandstormWeather_5mi: A sandstorm is predicted within five minutes. Be prepared and await further alerts.
MeteoCenter_Message_SandstormWeather_3mi: Attention! A sandstorm is coming. Strong gusts of wind and almost zero visibility in the lower atmosphere. It's almost safe upstairs, but watch the fuel gauge
MeteoCenter_Message_SandstormWeather_1mi: Sandstorm Begins! We recommend gaining a safe altitude as soon as possible!
MeteoCenter_Message_StormWeather_5min_wa: Attention, thunderstorm and strong wind gusts are forecasted! Estimated time before weather conditions worsen: 5-7 minutes.
MeteoCenter_Message_StormWeather_3min_wa: We repeat, a thunderstorm is coming! We recommend that all pilots get down to the ground. Flying in the middle atmosphere is life-threatening. Long haul flights - not recommended
MeteoCenter_Message_StormWeather_1min_wa: The storm begins! Reduce flight altitude to minimum as soon as possible.
Ship_AI_tutorial_ME_all: Tell me everything i should know
quest_halloween_entry: Greetings. Captain, some kind of witch-shit is going there! I receive dozens of strange incident reports from all over Raglore. People disappear, pilots hear terrible villainous laughter on different frequencies .. Some kind of Halloween in Raglor manner! We urgently need to do something. Are you in?
quest_halloween_ending: That should be enough. These things just drive radio equipment crazy! Thanks for your help, we will do the rest. Happy Halloween, and take care.
quest_halloween_skin: Kapu Incorporated rewards you with a special ship paint for your contribution to researching the mysteries of Raglor. You can buy it on Metallic-N
product_pumpkin_descr: A strange pumpkin-like creature or plant, it's hard to say without analysis. It would be really smart to sell it as soon as possible.
quest_halloween_entry_NPC_yes: Nice. Strange objects appeared here and there, transmitting creepy signal on several radio chanells. Most likely, they are responsible for this chaos. You need to collect them and bring to us, so we could do some research. They were seen only nearby big cities, so look there. Pick it up, and sell at any Landing Pad. And if you feel things go really bad - call me.
quest_halloween_entry_NPC_no: What a pity, we really need your help. If you change your mind - feel free to call me.
quest_halloween_ragequit_NPC: Captain, are you still alive? How is it going?
quest_halloween_ragequit_ME_yes: Please, get me out of this shit!
quest_halloween_ragequit_ME_no: Going well! Stand by for news
quest_halloween_ragequit_NPC_yes: Well, there is no choice then. Assistant, activate the 'X-228'-protocol. You kept a stiff upper lip, captain. May be next year u can do this.
quest_halloween_tip: What the hell is that?... Things are worse than we thought. Keep collecting them, and do it as soon as possible please!
Naval_Ship_Operator_descr: Communication officerr on a transport naval ship. Seems to be they transport food between the colony bases
tutorial_disable_message: Thank you for choosing 'Knowhow Solutions' - the best AI assistants in the galaxy! If you are interested in a specific chapter of the help, or if you want to turn off the help - contact me in the contacts menu {btnX} [IVT_Ship_ToggleMapStory] {/btnX}
Quest_Plum_Contacts_Tutorial_2: Captain, I'm still waiting for your call, I have a job for you. You can make a call using your ship interface.  Click message history - {btnX} [IVT_Ship_ToggleMapStory] {/btnX}, or go there through the map menu {btnX} [IVT_Ship_ToggleMap] {/btnX}
Ship_AI_message_tutor_on: Welcome to 'Knowhow Solutions' help center. Here you can get detailed training on how to operate the ship and its onboard systems. Select the section of your interest
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_1: Hello captain! I see you've gotten a bit more experienced with your bird. But you seem to be missing a few important things. I can show you a couple of tricks that will make your life much easier.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_1_ME_no: Any help will come in handy
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_1_NPC_yes: You are really green, dont ya? We frontiers try to stick together and help each other as much as we can. Today I helped you, tomorrow you will help me. This is beneficial to everyone, don't you think? Okay, when you are ready - find me in {Quest}Bora{/Quest}.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_1_NPC_no: Very good. I'm waiting for you at {Quest}Bora, there we will train{/Quest}
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_4.5: How long! Throw the kit into the water at our mark, the guys on the boats will pick it up themselves. Don't bother with accuracy, just don't drop it on the ship.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_6: Well, that's it. Will do for the first time. A little practice, and such maneuvers will be easier for you. I recommend that you delve into the ship control settings, there you can learn a lot of new and useful things for yourself. Well, captain, glad to help. See you on Raglor!
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_2_1: Captain, takeoff in the Flight mode is fundamentally different from takeoff in the VTOL mode. For a successful takeoff you need a runway or a large flat area. Before swithcing In the air, however, it is necessary to gain speed and fly smoothly.
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_2_2: Tip: to save fuel, I recommend controlling the engine thrust. You can increase and decrease thrust by {ivt}[IVT_Ship_JetpackUD_PlaneFB_WheelsUD +]{/ivt} and {ivt} [IVT_Ship_JetpackUD_PlaneFB_WheelsUD -] {/ivt}, respectively. A reasonable thrust value for a typical long range flight is about a half of the maximum allowable thrust.
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_2_3: Tip: As with takeoff, the ship needs a runway or large flat area to land in flight mode. In this case, I recommend that you slow down, switch to VTOL mode - {ivt} [IVT_Ship_ToggleState] {/ivt}, and perform the usual landing maneuver.
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_4_2: Captain, i was told that you are inverstigating missing ship. Any news?
Help_Repair_Land_Message: WARNING: critically low battery level! It is highly recommended to land on earth or water to summon a repair drone
Help_Repair_DroneSummon_Message: In the map menu {btnX} [IVT_Ship_ToggleMap]{/btnX} press the 'Service drone' button. He will recharge the batteries and make a complete repair of the ship.
Quest_Astlan_Paul_entry: Hi there! My buddy need to be at {Quest}Nord{/Quest} asap. Pays 1500 cr. If you are interested - find him at {Quest}Astlan-Central{/Quest}.
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_1_message: Well, captain .. I see you are already know how it goes! Are you ready to conquer new heights? New wings for your bird have been delivered to the spaceport hangar. And they will open up wonderful prospects for you!
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_1_NPC_yes: The flight range is several times higher - so profit too; new, more profitable contracts will become available .. And finally - you can get to the mainland! All money and opportunities are overseas, on Raglor.
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_2: The process of compatibility with new equipment *wings* is completed. The firmware has been updated. A new flight mode is available. To enter itt, press {ivt} [IVT_Ship_ToggleState] {/ivt}. Also, I recommend that you read the instruction
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_3: Captain! We have an emergency here, and they advised us you. Transport ship suspiciously long time does not come to communication, Please find out what is the matter and take the necessary measures to solve the problem. Let's hope that their communication device just flew ...
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_4: Have you been sent to help us? Imagine, we float and ... BANG! Something huge rammed the left side of the ship. Some of the systems simply failed. Including steering. Due to damage, we are unable to reach the tech bay.. Report our situation to harbor master in Estel, he knows what to do.
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_5: And here is our repair kit! The guys will do the rest. Thank you, captain, we owe you. Safe flights!
Astlan_Sailor_descr: The captain of a sailing ship, met on the shores of Astlan. We got to know him like many other colonists - he got into trouble, and I'm helping him out.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_3_reserve:
"Excellent. You're well underway. Now we need to pick our cruise altitude. As a general rule, higher is better. The air is less dense, so you will be faster and more fuel efficient. For now, climb to an altitude above 1km.

Weather will ultimately dictate your final cruise altitude. Strong winds, thunderstorms and sandstorms are just a few factors that can affect your decision. Don't forget, AR mode {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleWinds]{/ivt} can help you understand the current atmospheric conditions.

Lastly, the unusual radiation from our local star can pierce through this atmosphere. We call it SKI. If you fly above the SKI level, you can expect your equipment aboard your aircraft to fail. Be careful."
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_4_reserve: Captain, the next feature is {Quest}flaps{/Quest} - {ivt} [IVT_Ship_ToggleFlaps] {/ivt} on the panel. Why burn fuel when you can 'ride' the wind? They can also be effectively used as an air brake
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_5_reserve: You are almost there, now - landing. Release the landing gear on {ivt} [IVT_Ship_ToggleChassis] {/ivt} in advance, carefully aim at the landing strip and go down. The cathc is to sit down as smoothly as possible, but you can't yawn either - otherwise you won't have time to slow down. Well, come on, you can do it.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_2:
So, about thirty kilometers southeast of Astlan there is a laboratory, they are digging some local ants, but they have an excellent runway.
The perfect place to practice your landing.
Set up a route and let's go.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_3:
Excellent. The next step is the flight altitude. Weather on this planet is unpredictable: storms, rains, sandstorms, appear all the time. There is a way to avoid it. Just gain an altitude above a kilometer and you ll be safe. Also, you can use AR mode {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleWinds] {/ivt} it will  help you to understand which altitude has acceptable wind conditions.
Consider, the higher you fly, the lower the density of the atmosphere, which means that the speed is higher at the same thrust, which means you save fuel and time.
However, radiation from a local star pierces the atmosphere very strongly, and equipment, up to engines, can fail at altitude. Be careful.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_4: We are approaching our destination, Melitt. It's time to descend and slow down. Descend below 500m, and reduce your thrust - 1/4 should do it. Your air brake is avaliable should you need it - {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleAirBrake]{/ivt}.
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_5: You are almost there. Now comes the most important part - landing. Go ahead, and line up with the runway. When your speed is below 150m/s, extend the flaps - {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleFlaps]{/ivt}. Your landing gear will lower automatically, but you can press {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleChassis]{/ivt} for manual control. It's all yours now, good luck!
quest_tutor_adv_flight_message_2_:
"Here's a tip for users without a throttle. You can tell your ship to hold a thrust setting with {Quest}fixed-thrust{/Quest}. Try it now. Press {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleCruise]{/ivt}. You will see a coloured box appear around your throttle, on the right ride of your HUD.
Now the controls {ivt}[IVT_Ship_JetpackUD_PlaneFB_WheelsUD+]{/ivt} and {ivt}[IVT_Ship_JetpackUD_PlaneFB_WheelsUD-]{/ivt} can be used to gradually increase and decrease thrust. Try and see if you can hover with fixed-thrust."
quest_tutor_cargo_discarding: Captain, to drop cargo in flight, you need to open the hold {ivt} [IVT_Ship_Cargo_OpenClose] {/ivt} and unload {ivt} [IVT_Ship_Cargo_ArmPut] {/ivt}.
quest_astlan_AR_tutorial: Captain, for a convenient display of volcanoes, geysers and winds, I recommend using AR mode - {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleWinds]{/ivt}
quest_astlan_SKI_tutorial: WARNING: The radiation form the nearby star significantly penetrates the atmosphere, it has a negative effect on the ship's systems and can lead to shutdowns. Be careful and us AR-mode {ivt}[IVT_Ship_ToggleWinds]{/ivt} to watch for safe height.
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_4_2_NPC_anws: So they need a new repair kit. But the ships one are out of stock! You have to find an alternative. I think {Quest}'Goliaf'{/Quest} - will fit. Once you find it - immediately fly there and throw it into the water.
Estel_Harbor_Master_descr: He is in charge of supplies, shipping, service and everything else related to watercraft. Subordinates seem to adore him
UniversalTuner_Eco_descr: Distributor firmware, which regulates the energy supply according to the impulse method. Significantly reduces engine fuel consumption. Illegal upgrade, like the entire Corsair line.
Achieve_1_descr: Visit all bases on Astlan island
Achieve_2_descr: Visit all bases on Raglor mainland
Achieve_3_descr: Visit all bases on the planet
Achieve_6_descr: Fly 100 km with cargo in the hold
Achieve_7_descr: Fly 1 000 km with cargo in the hold
Achieve_8_descr: Fly 100 000 km with cargo in the hold
Achieve_17_descr: Deliver and sell cargo at 15 different bases
Achieve_18_descr: One last thing to do is monitor
Achieve_19_descr: Deliver and sell all available goods
Achieve_20_descr: Help build Canyon-Central to the maximum stage
Achieve_27_descr: Are you a hero or villain?
Achieve_28_descr: Collect 6 different biosamples from the ground
Manta_Recharge_Dialog: Captain, an external battery charge has been detected. Try to connect?
Quest_Plum_Wires_greeting: Hello, captain. It's me again. I found another job for you. If interested - call me
quest_fungus_news_entry: A civilian cargo ship arrived from the mainland of Hel to the northern island, base {Quest}Cultivator{/Quest}. Multiple orders are expected to emerge for the delivery of goods from the island to Astlan and Raglor. Have a nice day and thank you for using the NOVA News maling 'Frontier Pilot Ed.'.
Quest_Plum_Wires_msg_1: I asked a frontier like you to deliver a box of coils for a brand new power plant, but he crashed on his way from Estelle to Spaceport and canceled his contract. The cargo obviously lies in the wilds somewhere between these bases. Deliver it to me.
Quest_Plum_Wires_msg_2: Let's hope that at least some of the equipment has survived. Take this box to the Spaceport and place it on the loading bay - this is where you delivered the drones to me last time.
Quest_Plum_Wires_msg_3: Thank you, captain. Experts will immediately take care of the unbuckling and installation. And as always - credits on your account.
product_Astlan_Wires_descr: Very common inductors manufactured by 'Zeus Energy'. External analysis of the packaging shows that at least half of the batch is unusable.
Quest_Plum_Wires_msg_failed: To late. I could not convince the official to wait a little longer, he ordered a new batch. But you can keep the coils for yourself.
Achieve_21_3_descr: Reach an altitude of 6000 m. How did u do that?!
quest_biggun_guidance_1: Finally fluttered out of our cozy nest, eh? Congratulations! Raglor is big, it will take some time before you get comfortable here. When you get some money and  more impressive ship, you should go to the Big Crater. Fulfill a couple of their contracts and you'll swim in credits
quest_biggun_guidance_1_ME_yes: Big Crater? What is it and where?
quest_biggun_guidance_1_NPC_yes: Small island in the center of Raglor. Big Crater is a young mining colony, but the abundance of the military and thousands of all kinds of checks makes you wonder if this is really so.
QuestRaglor_Main_Ship_Hint_message: To transport these goods, you will need a powerful ship. Knowing this planet ship stock... Perhaps, only {Quest}Ballena{/Quest} will do. However, you can try to {Quest}pimp Ox{/Quest}, but no guarantees it will handle
quest_biggun_guidance_2:
Dear frontiers. Looking for an easy and profitable job? Tired of unstable and unprofitable side jobs? We are waiting for you in the center of the world. Big Crater! Big plans - great prospects!
The communication is sponsored by Monte & Co. For all questions, please contact the customer
quest_biggun_guidance_3: Greetings captain! Still not honoring the Big Crater with your visit? I recommend not to postpone it, the contracts there are very tasty. However, be careful: some of the contracts are of a military nature. Probably it's unsafe here..
Quest_alien_girl_1_greeting: Captain! A distress signal is seen on the emergency frequency. The calculation of the source exact coordinates  is complet.
Quest_alien_girl_2_greeting: Hey! I am here, on the ground. Please help me!
Quest_alien_girl_2_ship_analys: Captain, anomalous radiation from the shipwreck is detected. Initial analysis showed nothing. Record observations and continue analysis?
Quest_alien_girl_2_ship_analys_2: Captain, analysis of the wreckage is complete. The cause of the crash was the destruction of the hull by a combat aircraft laser (97% probability). The ship model is unknown. The origin of the ship is unknown. The composition of the ship's hull is absent in the database.
Quest_alien_girl_2: Thanks a lot! Argh, how much it hurts .. I think my lung is punctured. Captain, I urgently need to go to the hospital. Please..
Quest_alien_girl_2_NPC_yes: Well, nothing special.. Typical me, miseed first storm warning, missed the second one.. and when goes third - there is too late.
Quest_alien_girl_2_ending: Thank you, captain. You saved my life .. Okay, I'll go to the first-aid post myself. I hope to see you sometime under more favorable circumstances. At my expense!
Spygirl_Rebecca_descr: The girl who crashed under Hardmine base. It is worth taking a closer look at her ..
New_Passengers_Drop_Rules: Captain, I would like to inform you that the administration has made a number of amendments to the current air traffic rules. Passengers are now allowed to disembark only on the runway and passenger area (green markings)
PassengersWrongPlaceMessage_1: Captain, by the rules I'm not allowed to go out here. Please take me to the passenger area or runway
PassengersWrongPlaceMessage_2: Hmmm, I wouldn't like  to get a fine. According to the new rules, passengers are allowed to disembark only on the green area or runway.
PassengersWrongPlaceMessage_3: Captain, I suppose you should get me to the passenger area. Or at least on the runway. Thanks
quest_Hel_Whale_1: Captain, i have some non-trivial job for you. If you can handle it, they'll probably put your name on biology textbooks, hehe. You need to track down one amusing representative of the marine fauna. Are you taking it?
quest_Hel_Whale_1_ME_no: Where to and what to do?
quest_Hel_Whale_1_NPC_yes: Oceanus Octotitanus is a local celebrity, we have been watching him for a long time, but recently lost sight of him. One enthusiast spotted and tracked him with a drone. And, apparently, the drone flew too close, and now rests at the bottom of the sea. Apparently, the beast is about to migrate. Your task is to track down the end point of the {Quest}"whale's"{/Quest} route.
quest_Hel_Whale_1_NPC_no: Okay, I'll be brief. I sent you {Quest}coordinates{/Quest}: on the spot you will find a huge "whale". Follow him and do not lag behind, fint out where he migrates to. In the process, our person will contact you and tell you what to do next.
quest_Hel_Whale_2: It seems that he did not have time to swim far. Very good! Captain, fly after him, keep him in line of sight and keep up. Once he dives, the ship's sensors won't track him down. I think their limit is about 5 km.
quest_Hel_Whale_3: Hey buddy! You were contracted to track our big guy, i suppose? My drone was monitoring him. I got carried away a little, wanted to shoot cool 3D shots, and then suddenly the drone stalled and lost controll. Now he is lying on the seabed. {Quest} Can you get it?{/Quest}. However, i doubt you can do it without waterproof gear. I heard guys at Canyon developing it.
quest_Hel_Whale_4: Judging by the direction, he is going to the northern mainland, called Hel. A harsh place: biting frost, blizzards, treacherous landscape. Unlike Astlan and Raglor, there are few people there: several research camps and mining colonies.
quest_Hel_Whale_5: The "whale" has slowed down .. Well, it seems we are in place, at the end point of his migration. This is very interesting information, it is necessary to revise a number of facts known to us about this species. Thank you, captain, for your contribution to science!
quest_Hel_Whale_6: Were you able to fish out a drone? Not bad, buddy! Take him to the {Quest}base{/Quest}, the scientists will pay you a good price for his return. I managed to take a decent amount of pictures.
quest_Hel_Whale_7: Great job. We know very little about this species, and any information about it is very valuable. You will be richly rewarded for your work.
quest_Hel_Whale_5_failed: You seem to have missed him. Now we'll have to wait for next year, or hunt down another "whale". Hang up.
Photographer_Colin_descr: Professional photographer, travels the galaxy in search of beautiful shots and thrills. As it turned out, he is quite famous
quest_Hel_Whale_dropped: You missed it, didn't you? Well, we will have to attract more people to find him, or wait for the next year. Let's hope the drone data won't disappoint us.
quest_Hel_Whale_4_info: What a awesome beast, isn't it? I have seen something similar in ocean worlds, but they are significantly smaller in size. And who expected to see such a big guy here, on Raglor!
Quest_Hel_Debtor_1: Greetings! Are you heading for Raglor by any chance? I need a taxi to NORTH-1. The fee will not disappoint you.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_2_creditor: Whatsup. The birdie told me that a person named Vasily Khoizman came on your board. This guy owes me a decent amount of money, and it looks like he's going to screw it off the planet. Could you put a little pressure on his conscience? Don't hold back. If you can 'persuade' him, I will give you part of the amount.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_2: Nonsense! Who is this young man? I have no debts, and I don't know any Jonathan! Captain, don't listen to this rogue. Hurry, get me to NORTH-1.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_3_creditor: Look how he lies,  this scoundrel! And I didn’t tell you my name. Cap, it seems persuasion wont help. I suggest starting with the good old method, shake it hard like 7g. Let's see how he sings
Quest_Hel_Debtor_3: Goddamit! I almost flew out of this box!! Did you seriously believe this thug?!I will sue you both!
Quest_Hel_Debtor_4_creditor: He still rock the boat? No problem, we'll find his weakness. Let's get him sunbathing. Fly as high as possible, maybe a small non-lethal dose of radiation will make him change his mind.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_4: How much? ... Well, captain, nice try. But you won't take me with such a funny dose! Look at my bald head, ha ha. This bullshit is no match for monthly flights on the antediluvian Gage Express with its lousy casing. He wont get his money back!
Quest_Hel_Debtor_4_AI: Attention, captain! Dangerously high SKI. The estimated single radiation dose is 1.7gV. I highly recommend lowering the flight altitude.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_5_creditor: This bastard is tough... Okay, cap, let's go to the extreme. Do not be afraid and do not worry, I will throw loans on top of the associated costs. Pretend you want to drown him. I feel it will crack here for sure.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_5: What is that sound? Llike water is flowing? ... AAAAH, mommy! Captain, you are insane! I'm going to be flooded now, damn it! Okay, okay, all that money doesnt worth my life! Now I'm translating his freaking 200k. Lord, you are completely retarded.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_6_creditor: Hahaha, gotcha! Well done captain, you frightened him well. Money is already on my account. And your share is on yours. You can throw this easy rider at any station, or you can take it where he asked - I don't care. However, I strongly doubt that this scoundrel will pay you.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_6: Jesus, what a ride.. Captain, let me out allready.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_7_good: Well, here we are. And here is your generous payment, boss - 2500cr. Im leaving, have a good day.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_7_bad: It is very kind of you to bring me where I asked. But you do not seriously think that I will pay you, after all that happened? Not only will I have to run to hospitals, but now I'm bankrupt. You won't get a penny!
Quest_Hel_Debtor_crush: Opps.. Looks like you overdid a little, capitano. You dont know me, i dont know you. And yes, clear you message history. Over
Hel_Debtor_descr: Slightly absent-minded middle-aged man. Constantly looking around and hurrying somewhere.
Quest_Hel_Debtor_1_please: Time is running out. I urgently need to go to NORTH-1. Are you taking me or what?
Quest_Astlan_Wings_Tutorial_Map_hint: Coords recieved. Advice: you can put a mark in map menu {btnX}[IVT_Ship_ToggleMap]{/btnX}. Also, most of employers pin coorditates to their messages, they have yellow icon on up-right corner. Open contacts menu {btnX}[IVT_Ship_ToggleMapStory]{/btnX}, choose a message and press {btnX}[IVT_UI_Select]{/btnX}.
quest_Hel_Lost_1: Welcome to our little port, pilot! We always glad to see new carriers. However, i must warn you - be careful around here
quest_Hel_Lost_2: Something disturbig happens here. This is especially noticeable at night. Scary sounds, flashes of light in the mountains, large footprints in the snow. In general, there are enough oddities. Also, people seem to have disappeared: three young guys went on a hike in the mountains, and they have not heard from them for a long time
quest_Hel_Lost_3: Well, young fishermen. They recently arrived by distribution from Earth. These earthling have a strange tradition - to go to sleep in the wilderness and tell each other scary stories. Who in their mind is going to do this? .. I insisted that they take trackers and a communicator to get in touch. Last time they called back was yesterday evening - they said that they camped at these coordinates: (76000, 128630)
quest_Hel_Lost_4: Captain, detecting SOS signal. Please land next to the source for a more detailed analysis.
quest_Hel_Lost_5:
Assessment: problems with the operation of the radio station. Failure unrecognized.

Three weak signals detected. Most likely source: search tracker. The approximate coordinates of the sources are loaded.
quest_Hel_Lost_6: Analysis: a tracker with the login "David" was found. Severe damage to the case. The nature of the damage - acid decomposition. The substance is absent in the database. The composition of the substance is 93% the same as the gastric juice of the Carnagad giant worm.
quest_Hel_Lost_7:
Analysis: a tracker with the login "Stella" was found. No visible damage.
Note: The remnants of footprints in the snow are suddenly cut off. Living creatures, as well as dead bodies, were not found within a radius of 1 km.
quest_Hel_Lost_8: Analysis: a tracker with the login "IMPERATOR1337" was found. Deep analysis is not possible due to interference. The most likely cause of interference - the object is in a protected container.
quest_Hel_Lost_8_1: Who the hell is that bastard?! Get the hell outa here in one piece, while you can. We dont like unwanted guests here.
quest_Hel_Lost_9: Hello captain. Sorry if I scared you with all these freaky stories. The guys returned safe and sound. They behave strangely, hovewer... But you try to stay a couple of days in such cold weather! In genera - a false alarm.
Hel_bandit_descr: Better to stay away from this guy. His identifier is present in the wanted criminals database.
product_crush_drone_descr: Trash. Obviously it cannot be repaired.. However, there is a hope that the hard drive was not damaged.
bases_Hel_MountainCrash_descr: Looks like something forced the inhabitants of the camp to leave it in a hurry. Or someone did
AFC_Synthetic_Jet_Actuators_Descr: Basic active flow control module. Uses micro-jets to reduce aerodynamic drag by 2%. Lightweight and reliable.
AFC_Compressed_Air_Injection_Descr: Compressed air injection system that actively manipulates boundary layer airflow. Reduces drag by 7%, but adds significant mass.
AFC_Helium_Flow_Actuators_Descr: Advanced flow control using helium micro-jets. Achieves 10% drag reduction with minimal weight penalty. Rare technology.
AFC_Plasma_Flow_Actuators_Descr: Cutting-edge plasma discharge system that ionizes the boundary layer. 17% drag reduction. Extremely expensive and heavy, but unmatched performance.
FCS_Evaporative_Cooling_Descr: Basic fuel cooling system using evaporative heat exchange. Slightly increases fuel capacity. Entry-level thermal management.
FCS_Cryocoolers_Descr: Closed-loop cryocooler system for fuel thermal management. Moderate fuel capacity boost and engine efficiency improvement.
FCS_Liquid_Nitrogen_Descr: Liquid nitrogen (-196°C) cooling circuit. Significantly improves fuel density and engine thermal headroom.
FCS_Liquid_Hydrogen_Descr: Liquid hydrogen (-253°C) deep-cooling system. Near-maximum thermal efficiency. Requires specialized maintenance.
FCS_Liquid_Helium_Descr: Liquid helium (-269°C) ultra-cryogenic cooling. The ultimate fuel cooling technology. Adds considerable mass but provides unrivaled thermal performance.
CCS_Field_Compression_Scarab_Descr: Electromagnetic field compression unit that increases effective cargo capacity and max cargo count. Basic cargo enhancement.
CCS_Spatial_Compression_Scarab_Descr: Advanced spatial folding technology for cargo holds. Same capacity boost as field compression but with improved energy efficiency.
CCS_Mass_Reorganization_Scarab_Descr: Prototype mass reorganization system. Rearranges cargo at a molecular level for maximum packing density. Top-tier cargo expansion.
AOS_Passive_Depreciation_Scarab_Descr: Basic anti-overload system using passive dampening. Reduces cargo overload stress by 15%, but slightly reduces cargo capacity.
AOS_Inductive_Stabilization_Scarab_Descr: Electromagnetic inductive stabilization field. Reduces overload by 40%. Moderate cargo capacity trade-off.
AOS_Inertia_Bubble_Descr: Generates a localized inertia dampening bubble around the cargo bay. 60% overload reduction. Significant cargo capacity penalty.
AOS_Gravitational_Alignment_Scarab_Descr: Military-grade gravitational alignment system. Virtually eliminates cargo overload (80% reduction). Severe cargo capacity sacrifice.
product_industrial_chemicals_descr: Bulk industrial chemical compounds used in manufacturing and base maintenance. Handle with care.
product_laboratory_chemicals_descr: Highly refined laboratory-grade chemical reagents. Extremely fragile and valuable. Used in advanced research.
product_household_chemicals_descr: Standard household cleaning and maintenance supplies for colony residents.
product_medicines_descr: Pharmaceutical supplies for colony medical facilities. Moderate fragility.
product_clothes_descr: Textile goods and clothing for colony inhabitants. Durable and lightweight cargo.
product_industrial_filters_descr: Heavy-duty filtration systems for atmospheric processors and water purification plants. Expensive and bulky.
FuelInjectors_Standard_Scarab_Descr: Factory-spec fuel injectors with optimized nozzle geometry. +5% engine thrust at +5% fuel consumption. A balanced entry-level power boost.
FuelInjectors_HighPressure_Scarab_Descr: Military-surplus high-pressure injectors. Forces more fuel into the combustion chamber for +12% thrust, at only +8% consumption. Heavy but effective.
FuelInjectors_Plasma_Scarab_Descr: Experimental plasma-arc injectors that pre-ionize fuel before combustion. +20% engine thrust with just +10% fuel penalty. Extremely heavy and expensive.
FuelPumping_Mechanical_Scarab_Descr: Simple gear-driven fuel pump replacement. Improves fuel delivery efficiency, reducing consumption by 5%. Reliable and lightweight.
FuelPumping_Electric_Scarab_Descr: Variable-speed electric fuel pump with precise flow control. 12% fuel consumption reduction. Popular among long-haul pilots.
FuelPumping_Turbine_Scarab_Descr: Centrifugal turbine pump with near-zero pulsation. 20% fuel savings through optimal atomization. Top-tier efficiency upgrade.
FuelSystem_Extended_Scarab_Descr: Additional fuel line routing and auxiliary bladder tanks. +200 fuel capacity. Basic range extension.
FuelSystem_HighCapacity_Scarab_Descr: Conformal fuel cells integrated into the hull structure. +400 fuel capacity. Significant range improvement for long-distance flights.
FuelSystem_Integrated_Scarab_Descr: Complete fuel system overhaul with wet-wing design. +700 fuel capacity and 5% consumption reduction through optimized flow paths. The ultimate range upgrade.
